# Vježba 2 — Viskoznost i površinska napetost {.unnumbered}

Ova vježba obrađuje pojam viskoznosti kao unutarnjeg trenja fluida te površinsku napetost. Naučit ćete primjenjivati Newtonov zakon viskoznosti na različite geometrije i razumjeti kapilarne pojave.

## Fizikalni uvod

Viskoznost predstavlja otpor fluida prema gibanju, odnosno unutarnje trenje koje se javlja zbog međumolekularnih sila. Kada se fluid giba, slojevi fluida se opiru međusobnom klizanju, što rezultira smičnim naprezanjem. Newtonov zakon viskoznosti opisuje linearnu ovisnost naprezanja o gradijentu brzine.

$$\tau = \mu \frac{dv}{dy}$$

Gdje je:
- $\tau$ [Pa] – smično naprezanje
- $\mu$ [Pa·s] – dinamička viskoznost
- $dv/dy$ [1/s] – gradijent brzine (promjena brzine po visini sloja)

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Osnove viskoznosti (Newtonov zakon) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-visc-basics">
    <style>
        #widget-visc-basics {
            max-width: 980px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            border: 1px solid #dbe7f3;
            box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-top {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .widget-subtitle {
            margin: 8px 0 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
            max-width: 620px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .scene {
            position: relative;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%);
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 18px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics canvas {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .floating-caption {
            position: absolute;
            left: 16px;
            right: 16px;
            bottom: 14px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.45;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .formula-chip {
            background: rgba(15,23,42,0.92);
            color: #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 10px 14px;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.45;
            min-width: 210px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card,
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-item,
        #widget-visc-basics .explain-box {
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            border-radius: 14px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card {
            padding: 14px 16px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .control-card span {
            color: #2563eb;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics input[type="range"] {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(170px, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-item {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: #64748b;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            font-weight: 800;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-value {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-blue .metric-value { color: #1d4ed8; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-orange .metric-value { color: #c2410c; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-cyan .metric-value { color: #0f766e; }
        #widget-visc-basics .explain-box {
            padding: 14px 16px;
            background: #f8fafc;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .explain-title {
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #widget-visc-basics .explain-text {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            color: #334155;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
    </style>

    <div class="widget-top">
        <div>
            <div class="widget-kicker">Laboratorij viskoznosti</div>
            <h3 class="widget-title">Newtonov zakon kao lanac uzroka i posljedice</h3>
            <p class="widget-subtitle">Gornja ploča zadaje brzinu, razmak među pločama određuje strminu profila, a viskoznost pretvara taj gradijent u smično naprezanje. Widget sada to prikazuje kao tri jasna koraka, ne samo kao animaciju čestica.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="formula-chip">
            <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #93c5fd; margin-bottom: 4px;">Jednadžba uživo</div>
            <div><strong>dv/dy = v / δ</strong></div>
            <div><strong>τ = μ · dv/dy</strong></div>
            <div id="visc-formula-live" style="margin-top: 6px; color: #cbd5e1;"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="scene">
        <canvas id="visc-canvas" width="900" height="360"></canvas>
        <div id="visc-scene-caption" class="floating-caption"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Brzina gornje ploče v: <span id="v-val">1.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v-slider" min="0.1" max="5.0" value="1.0" step="0.1">
        </div>
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Dinamička viskoznost μ: <span id="mu-val">0.10</span> Pa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="mu-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" value="0.1" step="0.01">
        </div>
        <div class="control-card">
            <label>Zračnost δ: <span id="h-slider-val">10</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider" min="2" max="30" value="10" step="1">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item metric-blue">
            <span class="metric-label">Gradijent brzine</span>
            <div class="metric-value"><span id="grad-out">100</span> s⁻¹</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-item metric-orange">
            <span class="metric-label">Smično naprezanje</span>
            <div class="metric-value"><span id="tau-out">10.0</span> Pa</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-item metric-cyan">
            <span class="metric-label">Dominantni učinak</span>
            <div class="metric-value" id="visc-dominant">profil je blag</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="explain-box">
        <div class="explain-title">Pouka</div>
        <p class="explain-text" id="visc-explainer"></p>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('visc-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider');
        const muSl = document.getElementById('mu-slider');
        const hSl = document.getElementById('h-slider');
        const caption = document.getElementById('visc-scene-caption');

        const particles = Array.from({ length: 120 }, () => ({
            x: Math.random(),
            y: Math.random(),
            size: 1.5 + Math.random() * 1.8
        }));

        function roundRect(context, x, y, w, h, r, fill, stroke) {
            context.beginPath();
            context.moveTo(x + r, y);
            context.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
            context.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
            context.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
            context.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
            context.closePath();
            if (fill) context.fill();
            if (stroke) context.stroke();
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
            const headlen = 9;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = width;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            if (label) {
                ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
                ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 6);
            }
        }

        function update() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const mu = parseFloat(muSl.value);
            const deltaMm = parseFloat(hSl.value);
            const deltaM = deltaMm / 1000;
            const gapPx = deltaMm * 5.2;
            const gradient = v / deltaM;
            const tau = mu * gradient;

            document.getElementById('v-val').textContent = v.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('mu-val').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('h-slider-val').textContent = deltaMm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('grad-out').textContent = gradient.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('tau-out').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('visc-formula-live').textContent = `${mu.toFixed(2)} · ${gradient.toFixed(0)} = ${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa`;

            let dominant = 'profil je blag';
            if (gradient > 250) dominant = 'zračnost dominira';
            if (tau > 80) dominant = 'otpor slojeva je velik';
            if (mu > 0.6 && tau > 40) dominant = 'viskoznost dominira';
            document.getElementById('visc-dominant').textContent = dominant;

            document.getElementById('visc-explainer').textContent = `Ako gornju ploču pomakneš na ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s kroz zračnost ${deltaMm.toFixed(0)} mm, gradijent brzine naraste na ${gradient.toFixed(0)} s⁻¹. Viskoznost μ = ${mu.toFixed(2)} Pa·s taj gradijent zatim pretvara u smično naprezanje od ${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa. Dakle, brzina i razmak određuju strminu profila, a viskoznost određuje koliko će taj profil "koštati" u naprezanju.`;

            caption.innerHTML = `Lijevo vidiš slojeve fluida između ploča, desno njihov linearni profil brzine. Kada smanjiš <strong>δ</strong>, ista brzina mora se "prelomiti" na manjoj udaljenosti, pa <strong>dv/dy</strong> brzo raste.`;

            draw(v, mu, gapPx, gradient, tau);
        }

        function draw(v, mu, gapPx, gradient, tau) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const chamberLeft = 80;
            const chamberWidth = 520;
            const chamberRight = chamberLeft + chamberWidth;
            const centerY = 196;
            const topY = centerY - gapPx / 2;
            const botY = centerY + gapPx / 2;

            const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, topY, 0, botY);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(125, 211, 252, ${0.16 + mu * 0.16})`);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(59, 130, 246, ${0.10 + mu * 0.22})`);
            fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(125, 211, 252, ${0.16 + mu * 0.16})`);
            ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
            ctx.fillRect(chamberLeft, topY, chamberWidth, gapPx);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            roundRect(ctx, chamberLeft, topY - 14, chamberWidth, 14, 5, true, false);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            roundRect(ctx, chamberLeft, botY, chamberWidth, 14, 5, true, false);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`gornja ploča: v = ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s`, chamberLeft + 8, topY - 24);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.fillText('donja ploča: v = 0', chamberLeft + 8, botY + 32);

            particles.forEach((particle) => {
                const localRatio = 1 - particle.y;
                const localSpeed = v * localRatio;
                particle.x += 0.0014 + (localSpeed / Math.max(v, 0.001)) * 0.013;
                if (particle.x > 1.03) particle.x = -0.03;
                const px = chamberLeft + particle.x * chamberWidth;
                const py = topY + particle.y * gapPx;
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(3, 105, 161, ${0.22 + localRatio * 0.55})`;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, particle.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            });

            for (let i = 0; i <= 6; i++) {
                const ratio = i / 6;
                const y = botY - ratio * gapPx;
                const arrowLength = 16 + ratio * v * 44;
                drawArrow(chamberLeft + 16, y, chamberLeft + 16 + arrowLength, y, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.35 + ratio * 0.65})`, 2, i === 6 ? 'vmax' : '');
            }

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fb923c';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
            ctx.setLineDash([7, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(chamberRight + 28, botY + 2);
            ctx.lineTo(chamberRight + 28, topY - 2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#c2410c';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('δ', chamberRight + 36, centerY + 4);

            const profileX = 700;
            const profileW = 130;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
            roundRect(ctx, 660, 54, 190, 220, 16, true, false);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('Profil brzine', 676, 76);
            ctx.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`dv/dy = ${gradient.toFixed(0)} s⁻¹`, 676, 96);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let i = 0; i <= 24; i++) {
                const ratio = i / 24;
                const y = botY - ratio * gapPx;
                const x = profileX + ratio * Math.min(profileW, v * 18 + 30);
                if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();

            const stressBarX = 860;
            const stressTop = 70;
            const stressHeight = 170;
            const stressRatio = Math.min(tau / 140, 1);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fee2e2';
            ctx.fillRect(stressBarX, stressTop, 18, stressHeight);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.fillRect(stressBarX, stressTop + (1 - stressRatio) * stressHeight, 18, stressRatio * stressHeight);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fecaca';
            ctx.strokeRect(stressBarX, stressTop, 18, stressHeight);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#7f1d1d';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('τ', stressBarX - 2, stressTop - 8);
            ctx.fillText(`${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa`, stressBarX - 38, stressTop + stressHeight + 18);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        [vSl, muSl, hSl].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Što je gornja ploča brža ili je razmak među pločama manji, to je gradijent brzine strmiji. Veća viskoznost zatim taj gradijent pretvara u veće smično naprezanje.
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Newtonov zakon viskoznosti koristi se kada je veza između smičnog naprezanja i gradijenta brzine linearna.</li>
            <li>Kod površinske napetosti prvo provjeri djeluje li dominantno zakrivljenost slobodne površine ili hidrostatska ravnoteža stupca fluida.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Nemoj poistovjetiti viskoznost s gustoćom: gustoća utječe na težinu i uzgon, a viskoznost na otpor relativnom gibanju slojeva fluida.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Nenewtonski fluidi

U inženjerskoj praksi mnogi fluidi ne slijede linearni Newtonov zakon. Njihovo ponašanje opisuje se **Power-law modelom**:

$$\tau = K \cdot \left( \frac{dv}{dy} \right)^n$$

- $n = 1$: Newtonski fluid (voda, zrak, ulje)
- $n < 1$: Pseudoplastični (shear-thinning) - npr. boja, krv, kečap
- $n > 1$: Dilatantni (shear-thickening) - npr. mješavina škroba i vode
- **Binghamova plastika**: Potreban je početni naprezanje $\tau_0$ da bi uopće potekli (npr. pasta za zube)

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z10 — Okretni moment na krnjem stošcu {.unnumbered}

Ulje dinamičke viskoznosti $\mu$ ispunjava zračnost $\delta$. Potrebno je odrediti izraz za okretni moment potreban za rotaciju krnjeg stošca konstantnom kutnom brzinom. Prilikom proračuna zanemariti utjecaj gornjeg i donjeg horizontalnog dijela krnjeg stošca.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\mu, \delta$ | viskoznost i zračnost |
| $\omega$ | konst. kutna brzina |
| $\alpha |  |
| a |  |
| b |  |
| y$ | geometrija |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- Okretni moment $T = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Geometrija:** Radijus na visini $y$ je $r = y \cdot \tan\alpha$. Element površine plašta je $dA = 2\pi r \cdot ds = 2\pi (y \tan\alpha) \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha}$.
2. **Newtonov zakon:** Tangencijalno naprezanje je $\tau = \mu \frac{v}{\delta} = \mu \frac{\omega r}{\delta} = \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta}$.
3. **Moment sile:** Elementarni moment iznosi $dT = r \cdot \tau \cdot dA = (y \tan\alpha) \cdot \left( \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta} \right) \cdot \left( 2\pi y \tan\alpha \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha} \right)$.
4. **Integracija:** Ukupni moment dobivamo integracijom po visini od $a$ do $a+b$:
$$T = \int_a^{a+b} \frac{2\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{\delta \cos\alpha} y^3 dy = \mathbf{\frac{\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{2 \delta \cos\alpha} [(a+b)^4 - a^4]}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- GEOMETRIJSKI WIDGET ZA ZADATAK 10 -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z10-vfinal" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:220px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-scenes { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-bottom:16px; }
        @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-scenes { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-canvas-box { position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-box-label { position:absolute; top:12px; left:14px; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:#64748b; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-control, #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-metric, #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z10-vfinal .z10-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; color:#334155; font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z10-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z10-kicker">Z10 laboratorij momenta</div>
            <h4 class="z10-title">Lokalni radijus određuje lokalnu brzinu i lokalni doprinos momentu</h4>
            <p class="z10-sub">Kod rotirajućeg krnjeg stošca najvažnije je uočiti da radijus raste s visinom presjeka. Zbog toga u višim, širim zonama istodobno rastu tangencijalna brzina, smično naprezanje i poluga momenta.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z10-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Lanac uzroka</div>
            <div><strong>y</strong> određuje <strong>r = y tan α</strong></div>
            <div><strong>r</strong> određuje <strong>v = ωr</strong></div>
            <div><strong>v</strong> daje <strong>τ = μv/δ</strong></div>
            <div>veći <strong>r</strong> znači veći <strong>dT</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z10-scenes">
        <div class="z10-canvas-box">
            <span class="z10-box-label">Nacrt stošca i odabrani presjek</span>
            <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-side" width="560" height="280"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="z10-canvas-box">
            <span class="z10-box-label">Presjek i smično djelovanje</span>
            <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-top" width="420" height="280"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z10-controls">
        <div class="z10-control">
            <label>Visina baze a: <span id="z10-v7-val-a" style="color:#2563eb;">80</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-a" min="20" max="150" value="80" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z10-control">
            <label>Visina stošca b: <span id="z10-v7-val-b" style="color:#0f766e;">150</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-b" min="50" max="250" value="150" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
        </div>
        <div class="z10-control">
            <label>Kut nagiba α: <span id="z10-v7-val-alpha" style="color:#c2410c;">30</span>°</label>
            <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-alpha" min="5" max="60" value="30" style="accent-color:#c2410c;">
        </div>
        <div class="z10-control">
            <label>Pozicija presjeka y: <span id="z10-v7-val-y" style="color:#dc2626;">150</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-y" min="20" max="400" value="150" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z10-metrics">
        <div class="z10-metric"><small>Ukupni moment</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z10-v7-res-t">0.000</span> Nm</strong></div>
        <div class="z10-metric"><small>Lokalni radijus r(y)</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z10-v7-res-r">86.6</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z10-metric"><small>Tangencijalna brzina</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z10-v7-res-v">17.32</span> m/s</strong></div>
        <div class="z10-metric"><small>Smično naprezanje τ(y)</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z10-v7-res-tau">1443</span> Pa</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z10-explainer" id="z10-v7-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cSide = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-side');
        const cTop = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-top');
        if (!cSide || !cTop) return;
        const ctxSide = cSide.getContext('2d');
        const ctxTop = cTop.getContext('2d');

        const slA = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-a');
        const slB = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-b');
        const slAlpha = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-alpha');
        const slY = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-y');
        let phase = 0;

        function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
            const headlen = 9;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            if (label) {
                ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
                ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 6);
            }
        }

        function update() {
            const a = parseFloat(slA.value);
            const b = parseFloat(slB.value);
            const alphaDeg = parseFloat(slAlpha.value);
            const alpha = alphaDeg * Math.PI / 180;
            const mu = 0.1;
            const omega = 200;
            const delta = 0.0012;

            slY.min = a;
            slY.max = a + b;
            let y = parseFloat(slY.value);
            if (y < a) y = a;
            if (y > a + b) y = a + b;

            const rMm = y * Math.tan(alpha);
            const rM = rMm / 1000;
            const localV = omega * rM;
            const localTau = mu * localV / delta;
            const aM = a / 1000;
            const bM = b / 1000;
            const totalMoment = (Math.PI * mu * omega * Math.pow(Math.tan(alpha), 3) * (Math.pow(aM + bM, 4) - Math.pow(aM, 4))) / (2 * delta * Math.cos(alpha));

            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-a').textContent = a.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-b').textContent = b.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-alpha').textContent = alphaDeg.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-y').textContent = y.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-t').textContent = totalMoment.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-r').textContent = rMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-v').textContent = localV.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-tau').textContent = localTau.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-explainer').textContent = `Na presjeku y = ${y.toFixed(0)} mm radijus naraste na ${rMm.toFixed(1)} mm, pa rub te zone putuje brzinom ${localV.toFixed(2)} m/s. Zato ondje smično naprezanje raste na ${localTau.toFixed(0)} Pa. Kako moment dodatno množi silu s radijusom, gornje i šire zone krnjeg stošca doprinose ukupnom momentu nesrazmjerno više od donjih.`;

            drawSide(a, b, alpha, y, rMm);
            drawTop(rMm, localV, localTau);
        }

        function drawSide(a, b, alpha, yProbe, rMm) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctxSide.clearRect(0, 0, cSide.width, cSide.height);
            ctxSide.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxSide.fillRect(0, 0, cSide.width, cSide.height);

            const cx = 250;
            const baseLine = 248;
            const scale = 0.68;
            const r1 = a * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const r2 = (a + b) * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const y1 = baseLine - a * scale;
            const y2 = baseLine - (a + b) * scale;
            const probeY = baseLine - yProbe * scale;
            const rProbe = yProbe * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;

            const bodyGrad = ctxSide.createLinearGradient(0, y2, 0, y1);
            bodyGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(96,165,250,0.22)');
            bodyGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)');
            ctxSide.fillStyle = bodyGrad;
            ctxSide.beginPath();
            ctxSide.moveTo(cx - r1, y1);
            ctxSide.lineTo(cx + r1, y1);
            ctxSide.lineTo(cx + r2, y2);
            ctxSide.lineTo(cx - r2, y2);
            ctxSide.closePath();
            ctxSide.fill();
            ctxSide.strokeStyle = '#1e293b';
            ctxSide.lineWidth = 2.2;
            ctxSide.stroke();

            ctxSide.fillStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12)';
            ctxSide.fillRect(cx - rProbe, probeY - 10, rProbe * 2, 20);
            ctxSide.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctxSide.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxSide.beginPath();
            ctxSide.moveTo(cx - rProbe, probeY);
            ctxSide.lineTo(cx + rProbe, probeY);
            ctxSide.stroke();

            drawArrow(ctxSide, cx + rProbe + 18, probeY, cx + rProbe + 70 + Math.sin(phase) * 6, probeY, '#c2410c', 'v(y)');

            ctxSide.setLineDash([7, 5]);
            ctxSide.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctxSide.beginPath();
            ctxSide.moveTo(cx, baseLine + 4);
            ctxSide.lineTo(cx, y2 - 18);
            ctxSide.stroke();
            ctxSide.setLineDash([]);

            ctxSide.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctxSide.font = '12px Inter';
            ctxSide.fillText(`r(y) = ${rMm.toFixed(1)} mm`, cx + rProbe + 18, probeY + 22);
            ctxSide.fillText(`a = ${a.toFixed(0)} mm`, 34, y1 + 4);
            ctxSide.fillText(`a + b = ${(a + b).toFixed(0)} mm`, 34, y2 + 4);
            ctxSide.fillText('širi gornji dio daje najveći moment', 24, 30);
        }

        function drawTop(rMm, localV, localTau) {
            ctxTop.clearRect(0, 0, cTop.width, cTop.height);
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxTop.fillRect(0, 0, cTop.width, cTop.height);

            const cx = 210;
            const cy = 142;
            const rPx = Math.min(90, rMm * 0.7);
            const gapPx = 28;
            const stressRatio = Math.min(localTau / 2500, 1);

            ctxTop.beginPath();
            ctxTop.arc(cx, cy, rPx + gapPx, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctxTop.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctxTop.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxTop.stroke();

            ctxTop.beginPath();
            ctxTop.arc(cx, cy, rPx, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctxTop.fill();

            for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                const angle = (i / 10) * Math.PI * 2 + phase;
                const x1 = cx + Math.cos(angle) * rPx;
                const y1 = cy + Math.sin(angle) * rPx;
                const x2 = cx + Math.cos(angle) * (rPx + 24 + stressRatio * 18);
                const y2 = cy + Math.sin(angle) * (rPx + 24 + stressRatio * 18);
                drawArrow(ctxTop, x1, y1, x2, y2, '#2563eb', '');
            }

            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxTop.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctxTop.fillText(`v = ${localV.toFixed(2)} m/s`, 24, 36);
            ctxTop.fillText(`τ = ${localTau.toFixed(0)} Pa`, 24, 56);
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctxTop.font = '11px Inter';
            ctxTop.fillText('veći presjek -> veća tangencijalna brzina -> veći smični otpor', 24, 78);

            const barX = 360;
            const barTop = 50;
            const barHeight = 160;
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#fee2e2';
            ctxTop.fillRect(barX, barTop, 22, barHeight);
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctxTop.fillRect(barX, barTop + (1 - stressRatio) * barHeight, 22, stressRatio * barHeight);
            ctxTop.strokeStyle = '#fecaca';
            ctxTop.strokeRect(barX, barTop, 22, barHeight);
            ctxTop.fillStyle = '#7f1d1d';
            ctxTop.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
            ctxTop.fillText('lokalni τ', barX - 10, barTop - 10);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        [slA, slB, slAlpha, slY].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Okretni moment ovisi o četvrtoj potenciji polumjera ($y \tan \alpha$), što znači da gornji širi dijelovi stošca doprinose momentu znatno više nego donji uži dijelovi.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z11 — Proračun snage rotacije {.unnumbered}

Krnji stožac rotira konstantnom kutnom brzinom od $200 \, \text{rad/s}$ unutar spremnika napunjenog uljem SAE 10W. Ukoliko pretpostavimo konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja sa svih strana krnjeg stošca od $1,2 \, \text{mm}$, potrebno je odrediti snagu potrebnu za održavanje spomenute kutne brzine. Također odrediti i smanjenje potrebne snage kada se temperatura ulja povisi na $80 \, \text{°C}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $D |  |
| d |  |
| L$ | $0,12; 0,04; 0,12 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\omega$$ | $$200 \, \text{rad/s}$ |
| $\delta$$ | $$0,0012 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\mu_{20}, \mu_{80}$$ | $$0,1; 0,0078 \, \text{Pa s}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $P_{20} = ?$
- $\Delta P_{20-80} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Snaga na bazama:** $P_{baze} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 + d^4)}{32 \delta} = \mathbf{68,7 \, \text{W}}$.
2. **Snaga na plaštu:** $\tan\alpha = \frac{D-d}{2L} = 0,33 \implies \alpha = 18,4^\circ$.
   $P_{plašt} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 - d^4)}{32 \delta \sin\alpha} = \mathbf{211,9 \, \text{W}}$.
3. **Ukupna snaga (20 °C):** $P_{tot} = \mathbf{280,6 \, \text{W}}$.
4. **Pad snage na 80 °C:** $P_{80} = P_{20} \cdot \frac{0,0078}{0,1} = \mathbf{21,9 \, \text{W}}$ (Smanjenje za 92,2%).

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 11: Simulator rotacijskog trenja -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z11-v8" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-title { margin:0; color:#0f172a; font-size:1.42rem; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:230px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-scene { position:relative; background:radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-overlay { position:absolute; top:14px; right:14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.94); border:1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius:12px; padding:8px 12px; font-size:0.78rem; color:#334155; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-control, #widget-z11-v8 .z11-metric, #widget-z11-v8 .z11-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z11-v8 .z11-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z11-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z11-kicker">Z11 laboratorij snage</div>
            <h4 class="z11-title">Temperatura smanjuje μ, a time i snagu na plaštu i bazama</h4>
            <p class="z11-sub">Za ovaj zadatak nije dovoljno vidjeti samo ukupni rezultat. Student treba odmah uočiti da potrebna snaga dolazi iz dva izvora otpora, ali da oba ovise linearno o viskoznosti koja naglo pada kako se ulje zagrijava.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z11-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ključna ideja</div>
            <div><strong>P = ωT</strong>, a <strong>T ~ μω</strong></div>
            <div>zato vrijedi <strong>P ~ μω²</strong></div>
            <div>pad <strong>μ(T)</strong> odmah ruši potrebnu snagu</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z11-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-v8-sys" width="900" height="320"></canvas>
        <div class="z11-overlay">Ukupna snaga: <strong id="p-res-v8" style="color:#1d4ed8;">280.6</strong> W</div>
    </div>

    <div class="z11-controls">
        <div class="z11-control">
            <label>Kutna brzina ω: <span id="w-val-v8" style="color:#2563eb;">200</span> rad/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="w-slider-v8" min="0" max="800" step="10" value="200" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z11-control">
            <label>Temperatura T: <span id="t-val-v8" style="color:#dc2626;">20</span> °C</label>
            <input type="range" id="t-slider-v8" min="10" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z11-metrics">
        <div class="z11-metric"><small>Viskoznost μ(T)</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z11-res-mu">0.1000</span> Pa s</strong></div>
        <div class="z11-metric"><small>Snaga na bazama</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z11-res-base">68.7</span> W</strong></div>
        <div class="z11-metric"><small>Snaga na plaštu</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z11-res-shell">211.9</span> W</strong></div>
        <div class="z11-metric"><small>Pad prema 20 °C</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z11-res-drop">0.0</span> %</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z11-explainer" id="z11-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-v8-sys');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const wS = document.getElementById('w-slider-v8');
        const tS = document.getElementById('t-slider-v8');
        const state = { omega: 200, temp: 20, mu: 0.1, basePower: 68.7, shellPower: 211.9, totalPower: 280.6, drop: 0, phase: 0 };

        const D = 0.12;
        const d = 0.04;
        const L = 0.12;
        const delta = 0.0012;
        const alpha = Math.atan((D - d) / (2 * L));
        const mu20 = 0.1;
        const kVisc = Math.log(0.0078 / 0.1) / 60;
        const baselinePower20 = totalPowerFor(mu20, 200).total;

        function viscosityAt(temp) {
            return mu20 * Math.exp(kVisc * (temp - 20));
        }

        function totalPowerFor(mu, omega) {
            const basePower = (Math.PI * mu * omega * omega * (Math.pow(D, 4) + Math.pow(d, 4))) / (32 * delta);
            const shellPower = (Math.PI * mu * omega * omega * (Math.pow(D, 4) - Math.pow(d, 4))) / (32 * delta * Math.sin(alpha));
            return { basePower, shellPower, total: basePower + shellPower };
        }

        function update() {
            state.omega = parseFloat(wS.value);
            state.temp = parseFloat(tS.value);
            state.mu = viscosityAt(state.temp);

            const powers = totalPowerFor(state.mu, state.omega);
            state.basePower = powers.basePower;
            state.shellPower = powers.shellPower;
            state.totalPower = powers.total;

            const baselineAtCurrentOmega = totalPowerFor(mu20, state.omega).total;
            state.drop = baselineAtCurrentOmega > 0 ? (1 - state.totalPower / baselineAtCurrentOmega) * 100 : 0;

            document.getElementById('w-val-v8').textContent = state.omega.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('t-val-v8').textContent = state.temp.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('p-res-v8').textContent = state.totalPower.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z11-res-mu').textContent = state.mu.toFixed(4);
            document.getElementById('z11-res-base').textContent = state.basePower.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z11-res-shell').textContent = state.shellPower.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z11-res-drop').textContent = Math.max(0, state.drop).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z11-explainer').textContent = `Na T = ${state.temp.toFixed(0)} °C viskoznost padne na ${state.mu.toFixed(4)} Pa s. Pri ω = ${state.omega.toFixed(0)} rad/s za baze treba ${state.basePower.toFixed(1)} W, a za plašt ${state.shellPower.toFixed(1)} W, ukupno ${state.totalPower.toFixed(1)} W. Budući da je plašt najveća aktivna površina, on dominantno nosi disipaciju, a zagrijavanje ulja zato najviše smanjuje upravo taj dio snage.`;
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            const headlen = 9;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
        }

        function animate() {
            state.phase += 0.04 + state.omega / 10000;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const coneCx = 260;
            const coneCy = 165;
            const bottomHalf = 62;
            const topHalf = 22;
            const coneHeight = 150;
            const heatRatio = Math.min(Math.max((state.temp - 20) / 60, 0), 1);
            const oilColor = `rgba(${Math.round(59 + heatRatio * 180)}, ${Math.round(130 - heatRatio * 40)}, ${Math.round(246 - heatRatio * 150)}, 0.18)`;

            ctx.fillStyle = oilColor;
            ctx.fillRect(70, 60, 420, 210);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(70, 60, 420, 210);

            const coneGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, coneCy - coneHeight / 2, 0, coneCy + coneHeight / 2);
            coneGrad.addColorStop(0, '#475569');
            coneGrad.addColorStop(1, '#0f172a');
            ctx.fillStyle = coneGrad;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(coneCx - topHalf, coneCy - coneHeight / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(coneCx + topHalf, coneCy - coneHeight / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(coneCx + bottomHalf, coneCy + coneHeight / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(coneCx - bottomHalf, coneCy + coneHeight / 2);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                const level = i / 7;
                const y = coneCy + coneHeight / 2 - level * coneHeight;
                const halfWidth = bottomHalf - (bottomHalf - topHalf) * level;
                const arrowLen = 26 + state.omega / 18 * (0.5 + level * 0.5);
                drawArrow(coneCx + halfWidth + 10, y, coneCx + halfWidth + 10 + arrowLen, y, '#2563eb');
            }

            ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`ω = ${state.omega.toFixed(0)} rad/s`, 82, 82);
            ctx.fillText(`μ(T) = ${state.mu.toFixed(4)} Pa s`, 82, 102);
            ctx.fillText('plave strelice: smični otpor ulja', 82, 122);

            const barBaseRatio = Math.min(state.basePower / Math.max(state.totalPower, 1), 1);
            const barShellRatio = Math.min(state.shellPower / Math.max(state.totalPower, 1), 1);
            const barX = 610;
            const barY = 84;
            const barW = 54;
            const barH = 170;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, barW, barH);
            ctx.fillRect(barX + 90, barY, barW, barH);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#16a34a';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY + (1 - barBaseRatio) * barH, barW, barBaseRatio * barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillRect(barX + 90, barY + (1 - barShellRatio) * barH, barW, barShellRatio * barH);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('Baze', barX + 6, barY - 10);
            ctx.fillText('Plašt', barX + 92, barY - 10);
            ctx.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`${state.basePower.toFixed(1)} W`, barX - 6, barY + barH + 18);
            ctx.fillText(`${state.shellPower.toFixed(1)} W`, barX + 80, barY + barH + 18);

            const gaugeX = 760;
            const gaugeY = 150;
            const radius = 54;
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.lineWidth = 8;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(gaugeX, gaugeY, radius, Math.PI, 2 * Math.PI);
            ctx.stroke();
            const powerRatio = Math.min(state.totalPower / Math.max(baselinePower20 * 6, 1), 1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(gaugeX, gaugeY, radius, Math.PI, Math.PI + powerRatio * Math.PI);
            ctx.stroke();
            const needleAngle = Math.PI + powerRatio * Math.PI;
            drawArrow(gaugeX, gaugeY, gaugeX + Math.cos(needleAngle) * 42, gaugeY + Math.sin(needleAngle) * 42, '#7f1d1d');
            ctx.fillStyle = '#7f1d1d';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('P', gaugeX - 5, gaugeY + 6);

            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        [wS, tS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
        update();
        animate();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Viskoznost ulja dramatično pada s porastom temperature, što izravno smanjuje potrebnu snagu za rotaciju. Ovo je ključno u sustavima podmazivanja strojeva.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z12 — Kapilarni porast (Voda vs Živa) {.unnumbered}

Pri temperaturi $60 \, \text{°C}$ površinska napetost žive iznosi $0,47 \, \text{N/m}$, dok je površinska napetost vode $0,0662 \, \text{N/m}$. Potrebno je odrediti promjene kapilarnog porasta visine dotičnih tekućina kada se nalaze u kontaktu sa zrakom unutar staklene cijevi polumjera $0,3 \, \text{mm}$. Kut kvašenja za živu iznosi $130^\circ$, dok za vodu iznosi $0^\circ$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\sigma_{Hg}, \sigma_v$$ | $$0,47; 0,0662 \, \text{N/m}$ |
| $R_c$$ | $$0,0003 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\theta_{Hg}, \theta_v$$ | $$130^\circ, 0^\circ$ |
| $\rho_{Hg}, \rho_v$$ | $$13480; 983,7 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $h_v
- h_{Hg} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

- **Voda:** $h_v = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0662 \cdot \cos 0^\circ}{983,7 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{45,7 \, \text{mm}}$
- **Živa:** $h_{Hg} = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,47 \cdot \cos 130^\circ}{13480 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{-15,2 \, \text{mm}}$ (kapilarna depresija)

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 12: Usporedna kapilarnost -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z12-vdual-fixed" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:220px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-scene { position:relative; background:radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-control, #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-metric, #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
        #widget-z12-vdual-fixed .z12-label { position:absolute; top:14px; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:800; width:50%; text-align:center; }
    </style>

    <div class="z12-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z12-kicker">Z12 laboratorij kapilarnosti</div>
            <h4 class="z12-title">Ista kapilara, ali suprotan učinak zbog različitog kuta kvašenja</h4>
            <p class="z12-sub">Ključ za razumijevanje ovog zadatka nije samo formula za visinu stupca nego znak člana <strong>cos θ</strong>. Kod vode je on pozitivan pa nastaje uspon, a kod žive negativan pa nastaje depresija.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z12-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Znak odlučuje smjer</div>
            <div>Voda: <strong>θ = 0°</strong> -> <strong>cos θ > 0</strong></div>
            <div>Živa: <strong>θ = 130°</strong> -> <strong>cos θ < 0</strong></div>
            <div>zato jedna tekućina ide gore, a druga dolje</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z12-scene">
        <span class="z12-label" style="left:0; color:#2563eb;">Voda: konkavni menisk i kapilarni uspon</span>
        <span class="z12-label" style="right:0; color:#475569;">Živa: konveksni menisk i kapilarna depresija</span>
        <canvas id="canvas-z12-dual" width="900" height="420"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z12-controls">
        <div class="z12-control">
            <label>Polumjer kapilare R: <span id="r-val-z12-dual" style="color:#2563eb;">0.30</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="r-slider-z12-dual" min="0.1" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0.3" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z12-metrics">
        <div class="z12-metric"><small>Voda h_v</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="hv-res-z12">45.7</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z12-metric"><small>Živa h_Hg</small><strong style="color:#6b7280;"><span id="hhg-res-z12">-15.2</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z12-metric"><small>cos θ za vodu</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;">+<span id="z12-res-cosw">1.00</span></strong></div>
        <div class="z12-metric"><small>cos θ za živu</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z12-res-coshg">-0.64</span></strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z12-explainer" id="z12-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z12-dual');
        if (!canvas) return;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const rSl = document.getElementById('r-slider-z12-dual');
        let phase = 0;

        function update() {
            const rMm = parseFloat(rSl.value);
            const R = rMm / 1000;
            const g = 9.81;
            const cosW = Math.cos(0);
            const cosHg = Math.cos(130 * Math.PI / 180);
            const hWater = (2 * 0.0662 * cosW) / (983.7 * g * R);
            const hMercury = (2 * 0.47 * cosHg) / (13480 * g * R);

            document.getElementById('r-val-z12-dual').textContent = rMm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('hv-res-z12').textContent = (hWater * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('hhg-res-z12').textContent = (hMercury * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z12-res-cosw').textContent = cosW.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z12-res-coshg').textContent = cosHg.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z12-explainer').textContent = `Za R = ${rMm.toFixed(2)} mm voda ima pozitivan član cos θ = ${cosW.toFixed(2)}, pa se podigne za ${(hWater * 1000).toFixed(1)} mm. Živa ima cos θ = ${cosHg.toFixed(2)}, zato je izraz negativan i razina padne za ${Math.abs(hMercury * 1000).toFixed(1)} mm. Smanjiš li radijus, oba učinka rastu po apsolutnoj vrijednosti jer je visina obrnuto proporcionalna polumjeru.`;

            draw(hWater, hMercury, rMm, cosW, cosHg);
        }

        function drawMeniscus(centerX, tubeHalfWidth, y, curvature, color, riseUp) {
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeHalfWidth, y);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(centerX, y + curvature, centerX + tubeHalfWidth, y);
            ctx.lineTo(centerX + tubeHalfWidth, 380);
            ctx.lineTo(centerX - tubeHalfWidth, 380);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.strokeStyle = riseUp ? '#1d4ed8' : '#6b7280';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeHalfWidth, y);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(centerX, y + curvature, centerX + tubeHalfWidth, y);
            ctx.stroke();
        }

        function draw(heightWater, heightMercury, rMm, cosW, cosHg) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const baseY = 280;
            const pxPerM = 2000;
            const tubeHalfWidth = Math.max(10, rMm * 40);
            const leftX = 230;
            const rightX = 670;
            const waterY = baseY - heightWater * pxPerM;
            const mercuryY = baseY - heightMercury * pxPerM;

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.08)';
            ctx.fillRect(50, baseY, 360, 130);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100,116,139,0.08)';
            ctx.fillRect(490, baseY, 360, 130);

            [leftX, rightX].forEach((x) => {
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
                ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x - tubeHalfWidth, 60);
                ctx.lineTo(x - tubeHalfWidth, 390);
                ctx.moveTo(x + tubeHalfWidth, 60);
                ctx.lineTo(x + tubeHalfWidth, 390);
                ctx.stroke();
            });

            ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.fillRect(60, baseY, 340, 8);
            ctx.fillRect(500, baseY, 340, 8);

            drawMeniscus(leftX, tubeHalfWidth - 1, waterY, 16 + Math.sin(phase) * 1.5, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.78)', true);
            drawMeniscus(rightX, tubeHalfWidth - 1, mercuryY, -14 + Math.sin(phase) * 1.2, 'rgba(107,114,128,0.82)', false);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(40, baseY);
            ctx.lineTo(860, baseY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(leftX + 58, baseY);
            ctx.lineTo(leftX + 58, waterY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`h_v = ${(heightWater * 1000).toFixed(1)} mm`, leftX + 70, (baseY + waterY) / 2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b7280';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(rightX + 58, baseY);
            ctx.lineTo(rightX + 58, mercuryY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280';
            ctx.fillText(`h_Hg = ${(heightMercury * 1000).toFixed(1)} mm`, rightX + 70, (baseY + mercuryY) / 2);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = '12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`cos θ = ${cosW.toFixed(2)} > 0`, 90, 92);
            ctx.fillText(`cos θ = ${cosHg.toFixed(2)} < 0`, 530, 92);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.fillText('pozitivan član daje uspon', 90, 112);
            ctx.fillText('negativan član daje depresiju', 530, 112);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        rSl.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Voda se uspinje u kapilari zbog jače adhezije (privlačenje staklu), dok se živa spušta (depresija) zbog jače kohezije (privlačenje samoj sebi).
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z13 — Young-Laplaceov zakon {.unnumbered}

Kuglolika kap vode temperature $25 \, \text{°C}$ u dodiru sa zrakom ima promjer $0,5 \, \text{mm}$. Tlak unutar kapi veći je od atmosferskog tlaka za $565 \, \text{Pa}$. Potrebno je odrediti vrijednost površinske napetosti.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\Delta p$$ | $$565 \, \text{Pa}$ |
| $D_k$$ | $$0,0005 \, \text{m}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $\sigma = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

$$\Delta p = \frac{4\sigma}{D} \implies \sigma = \frac{\Delta p \cdot D}{4} = \frac{565 \cdot 0,0005}{4} = \mathbf{0,0706 \, \text{N/m}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 13: Young-Laplace -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z13-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-title { margin:0; color:#0f172a; font-size:1.42rem; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:220px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-scene { position:relative; background:#0f172a; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-control, #widget-z13-advanced .z13-metric, #widget-z13-advanced .z13-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z13-advanced .z13-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z13-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z13-kicker">Z13 laboratorij zakrivljenosti</div>
            <h4 class="z13-title">Manja kap znači veća zakrivljenost i veći unutarnji nadtlak</h4>
            <p class="z13-sub">Young-Laplaceov zakon ovdje treba biti vizualno očit: površina napeta poput membrane jače "stišće" malu kap nego veliku. Zato se u widgetu sada direktno vidi veza između promjera, zakrivljenosti i nadtlaka.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z13-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Jednadžba</div>
            <div><strong>Δp = 4σ / D</strong></div>
            <div>manji <strong>D</strong> -> veći <strong>Δp</strong></div>
            <div>veći <strong>σ</strong> -> veće "stezanje" kapi</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z13-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-yl" width="900" height="320"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z13-controls">
        <div class="z13-control">
            <label>Promjer kapi D: <span id="yl-val-d" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="yl-slider-d" min="0.1" max="3.0" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z13-control">
            <label>Površinska napetost σ: <span id="yl-val-sig" style="color:#0f766e;">0.073</span> N/m</label>
            <input type="range" id="yl-slider-sig" min="0.010" max="0.100" step="0.001" value="0.073" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z13-metrics">
        <div class="z13-metric"><small>Unutarnji nadtlak Δp</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="yl-res-dp">584</span> Pa</strong></div>
        <div class="z13-metric"><small>Polumjer kapi</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z13-res-r">0.25</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z13-metric"><small>Relativna zakrivljenost 1/D</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z13-res-curv">2.00</span> mm⁻¹</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z13-explainer" id="z13-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-yl');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slD = document.getElementById('yl-slider-d');
        const slSig = document.getElementById('yl-slider-sig');
        let phase = 0;

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            const headlen = 9;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
        }

        function update() {
            const Dmm = parseFloat(slD.value);
            const sigma = parseFloat(slSig.value);
            const dp = (4 * sigma) / (Dmm / 1000);
            const radiusMm = Dmm / 2;
            const curvature = 1 / Dmm;

            document.getElementById('yl-val-d').textContent = Dmm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('yl-val-sig').textContent = sigma.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('yl-res-dp').textContent = Math.round(dp);
            document.getElementById('z13-res-r').textContent = radiusMm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z13-res-curv').textContent = curvature.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z13-explainer').textContent = `Za promjer ${Dmm.toFixed(2)} mm površinska napetost σ = ${sigma.toFixed(3)} N/m daje unutarnji nadtlak od ${Math.round(dp)} Pa. Ako smanjiš kap, zakrivljenost raste na ${curvature.toFixed(2)} mm⁻¹ pa se membranski učinak pojača. Zato male kapi i mjehuri imaju znatno veći unutarnji tlak od velikih.`;

            draw(Dmm, dp, sigma);
        }

        function draw(Dmm, dp, sigma) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const cx = 330;
            const cy = 170;
            const rPx = Math.max(28, Math.min(120, Dmm * 65));
            const pressureRatio = Math.min(dp / 1400, 1);

            const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx - 20, cy - 26, 12, cx, cy, rPx);
            grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.95)');
            grad.addColorStop(0.6, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.95)');
            grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(29, 78, 216, 0.98)');
            ctx.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(cx, cy, rPx, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${0.35 + pressureRatio * 0.4})`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.stroke();

            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2 + phase * 0.5;
                const x1 = cx + Math.cos(angle) * (rPx + 42);
                const y1 = cy + Math.sin(angle) * (rPx + 42);
                const x2 = cx + Math.cos(angle) * (rPx + 6);
                const y2 = cy + Math.sin(angle) * (rPx + 6);
                drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, '#fca5a5');
            }

            ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('površinska napetost stišće kap prema unutra', 80, 38);
            ctx.fillText(`Δp = ${Math.round(dp)} Pa`, 600, 84);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#93c5fd';
            ctx.fillText(`D = ${Dmm.toFixed(2)} mm`, 600, 110);
            ctx.fillText(`σ = ${sigma.toFixed(3)} N/m`, 600, 136);

            const barX = 620;
            const barY = 160;
            const barH = 120;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, 24, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY + (1 - pressureRatio) * barH, 24, pressureRatio * barH);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fca5a5';
            ctx.strokeRect(barX, barY, 24, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fecaca';
            ctx.font = '12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('jačina Δp', barX - 14, barY - 12);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - rPx, 286);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + rPx, 286);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctx.fillText(`promjer D`, cx - 26, 304);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        slD.addEventListener('input', update);
        slSig.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Što je promjer kapi manji, to je zakrivljenost veća, a površinska napetost "jače" stišće unutrašnjost, uzrokujući veći unutarnji nadtlak.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z14 — Sila na staklenu cijev {.unnumbered}

Staklena cijev uronjena je u živu kao što je prikazano na slici. Temperatura iznosi $20 \, \text{°C}$. Potrebno je odrediti silu na staklenu cijev uslijed utjecaja površinske napetosti.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\sigma_{Hg}$$ | $$0,514 \, \text{N/m}$ |
| $d_o |  |
| d_i$ | $35; 25 \, \text{mm}$ |
| $\theta_{Hg}$ | $50^\circ$ (vidljivo) |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $F_{\sigma
- s} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

$$F_\sigma = \sigma \cdot \pi \cdot (d_o + d_i) \cdot \cos(50^\circ) = 0,514 \cdot \pi \cdot (0,035 + 0,025) \cdot 0,642 = \mathbf{0,0623 \, \text{N}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 14: Sila na cijevi -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z14-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-control, #widget-z14-advanced .z14-metric, #widget-z14-advanced .z14-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z14-advanced .z14-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>
    <div class="z14-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z14-kicker">Z14 laboratorij sile</div>
            <h4 class="z14-title">Sila dolazi s cijelog kontaktnog perimetra, ali samo vertikalna komponenta podiže cijev</h4>
            <p class="z14-sub">Ovdje je bitno da student ne vidi samo jedan broj, nego da shvati da površinska napetost djeluje duž obaju rubova cijevi, a u ukupnu silu ulazi samo vertikalna komponenta određena kutom kvašenja.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z14-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Bilanca</div>
            <div>ukupni rub: <strong>π(d₀ + dᵢ)</strong></div>
            <div>napetost djeluje tangencijalno uz menisk</div>
            <div>vertikalno ostaje <strong>cos θ</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z14-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-z14-v2" width="900" height="320"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z14-controls">
        <div class="z14-control">
            <label>Vanjski promjer d₀: <span id="z14-val-do" style="color:#2563eb;">35</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z14-slider-do" min="30" max="60" value="35" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z14-control">
            <label>Kut kvašenja θ: <span id="z14-val-theta" style="color:#c2410c;">50</span>°</label>
            <input type="range" id="z14-slider-theta" min="0" max="180" value="50" style="accent-color:#c2410c;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z14-metrics">
        <div class="z14-metric"><small>Ukupni perimetar dodira</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z14-res-perim">188.5</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z14-metric"><small>cos θ</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z14-res-cos">0.64</span></strong></div>
        <div class="z14-metric"><small>Vertikalna sila Fσ</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z14-res-fz">0.0623</span> N</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z14-explainer" id="z14-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z14-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDo = document.getElementById('z14-slider-do');
        const slTh = document.getElementById('z14-slider-theta');
        let phase = 0;

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            const headlen = 8;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
        }

        function update() {
            const doMm = parseFloat(slDo.value);
            const diMm = 25;
            const thetaDeg = parseFloat(slTh.value);
            const cosTheta = Math.cos(thetaDeg * Math.PI / 180);
            const perimeterMm = Math.PI * (doMm + diMm);
            const force = Math.abs(0.514 * perimeterMm / 1000 * cosTheta);

            document.getElementById('z14-val-do').textContent = doMm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z14-val-theta').textContent = thetaDeg.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z14-res-perim').textContent = perimeterMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z14-res-cos').textContent = cosTheta.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z14-res-fz').textContent = force.toFixed(4);
            document.getElementById('z14-explainer').textContent = `Za d₀ = ${doMm.toFixed(0)} mm ukupni dodirni perimetar iznosi ${perimeterMm.toFixed(1)} mm. Površinska napetost djeluje uz menisk na unutarnjem i vanjskom rubu, ali u vertikalnom smjeru ostaje samo komponenta određena s cos θ = ${cosTheta.toFixed(2)}. Zato ukupna sila na cijev iznosi ${force.toFixed(4)} N.`;

            draw(doMm, thetaDeg, cosTheta, force);
        }

        function draw(doMm, thetaDeg, cosTheta, force) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const left = 320;
            const top = 40;
            const tubeOuter = 150 + (doMm - 35) * 2;
            const tubeInner = 100;
            const liquidY = 235;
            const centerX = left + tubeOuter / 2;
            const theta = thetaDeg * Math.PI / 180;
            const meniscusRise = Math.cos(theta) * 18;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            ctx.fillRect(0, liquidY, canvas.width, canvas.height - liquidY);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#9ca3af';
```
