```{=html}
            ctx.fillRect(left, top, tubeOuter, 220);
            ctx.clearRect(left + (tubeOuter - tubeInner) / 2, top, tubeInner, 220);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100,116,139,0.28)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(left + (tubeOuter - tubeInner) / 2, liquidY);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(centerX, liquidY - meniscusRise - Math.sin(phase) * 1.2, left + (tubeOuter + tubeInner) / 2, liquidY);
            ctx.lineTo(left + (tubeOuter + tubeInner) / 2, canvas.height);
            ctx.lineTo(left + (tubeOuter - tubeInner) / 2, canvas.height);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            const edgeLeft = left + (tubeOuter - tubeInner) / 2;
            const edgeRight = left + (tubeOuter + tubeInner) / 2;
            const tangLen = 42;
            const tangentAngleLeft = -theta;
            const tangentAngleRight = Math.PI + theta;
            drawArrow(edgeLeft, liquidY, edgeLeft + Math.cos(tangentAngleLeft) * tangLen, liquidY + Math.sin(tangentAngleLeft) * tangLen, '#2563eb');
            drawArrow(edgeRight, liquidY, edgeRight + Math.cos(tangentAngleRight) * tangLen, liquidY + Math.sin(tangentAngleRight) * tangLen, '#2563eb');
            drawArrow(centerX, 140, centerX, 90 - Math.abs(cosTheta) * 35, '#16a34a');

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`θ = ${thetaDeg.toFixed(0)}°`, edgeRight + 36, liquidY - 16);
            ctx.fillText(`Fσ = ${force.toFixed(4)} N`, centerX + 26, 102);
            ctx.fillText('unutarnji + vanjski perimetar', 78, 64);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('plave strelice: smjer sile površinske napetosti uz menisk', 78, 84);
            ctx.fillText('zelena strelica: ukupna vertikalna komponenta', 78, 102);

            const barX = 720;
            const barY = 70;
            const barH = 170;
            const ratio = Math.min(Math.abs(cosTheta), 1);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fff7ed';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, 22, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f97316';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY + (1 - ratio) * barH, 22, ratio * barH);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fdba74';
            ctx.strokeRect(barX, barY, 22, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#9a3412';
            ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('|cos θ|', barX - 12, barY - 10);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        slDo.addEventListener('input', update);
        slTh.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Sila površinske napetosti djeluje po cijelom perimetru dodira (unutarnjem i vanjskom bridu cijevi). Ukupna vertikalna komponenta ovisi o kosinusu kuta kvašenja.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z15 — Plutajuća kuglica {.unnumbered}

Potrebno je odrediti maksimalan promjer čelične i aluminijske kuglice koje mogu plutati na vodi zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, pri čemu temperatura vode iznosi $20 \, \text{°C}$. Gustoća čelika iznosi $7800 \, \text{kg/m³}$, dok je gustoća aluminija $2700 \, \text{kg/m³}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $\rho_c, \rho_{Al}$$ | $$7800; 2700 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $\sigma_v$$ | $$0,073 \, \text{N/m}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $d_{max
- c}
- d_{max
- Al} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

$$D_{max} = \sqrt{\frac{6\sigma}{\rho g}}$$

- **Čelik:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{7800 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{2,4 \, \text{mm}}$
- **Aluminij:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{2700 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{4,1 \, \text{mm}}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 15: Plutajuća kuglica -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z15-vfinal" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-control, #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-metric, #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-control input, #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-control select { width:100%; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
        #widget-z15-vfinal .z15-status { text-align:center; font-weight:800; padding:12px; border-radius:12px; }
    </style>
    <div class="z15-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z15-kicker">Z15 laboratorij plutanja</div>
            <h4 class="z15-title">Kuglica pluta samo dok je obodna sila površinske napetosti jača od težine</h4>
            <p class="z15-sub">Ovaj zadatak je zapravo natjecanje dviju skala: težina raste s volumenom kuglice, a nosiva sila površinske napetosti samo s opsegom kontakta. Zato veće kuglice vrlo brzo izgube mogućnost plutanja.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z15-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ključni kontrast</div>
            <div><strong>F_g ~ d³</strong></div>
            <div><strong>F_σ ~ d</strong></div>
            <div>zato postoji stroga granica promjera</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z15-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-z15-vfinal" width="900" height="300"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z15-controls">
        <div class="z15-control">
            <label>Promjer d: <span id="d-val-z15" style="color:#2563eb;">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="d-slider-z15" min="0.5" max="6.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z15-control">
            <label>Materijal</label>
            <select id="mat-select-z15" style="padding:8px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0;"><option value="7800">Čelik</option><option value="2700" selected>Aluminij</option></select>
        </div>
        <div class="z15-control">
            <div id="status-z15" class="z15-status">PLUTA</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z15-metrics">
        <div class="z15-metric"><small>Težina kuglice Fg</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z15-res-fg">0.0001</span> N</strong></div>
        <div class="z15-metric"><small>Površinska sila Fσ</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z15-res-fs">0.0005</span> N</strong></div>
        <div class="z15-metric"><small>Maks. promjer za materijal</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z15-res-dmax">4.1</span> mm</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z15-explainer" id="z15-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z15-vfinal');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const dS = document.getElementById('d-slider-z15');
        const mS = document.getElementById('mat-select-z15');
        let phase = 0;

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            const headlen = 8;
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
        }

        function update() {
            const dMm = parseFloat(dS.value);
            const rho = parseFloat(mS.value);
            const material = rho === 7800 ? 'Čelik' : 'Aluminij';
            const d = dMm / 1000;
            const sigma = 0.073;
            const g = 9.81;
            const Fg = rho * (4 / 3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(d / 2, 3) * g;
            const Fs = Math.PI * d * sigma;
            const dMax = Math.sqrt((6 * sigma) / (rho * g)) * 1000;
            const floats = Fg <= Fs;

            document.getElementById('d-val-z15').textContent = dMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z15-res-fg').textContent = Fg.toFixed(4);
            document.getElementById('z15-res-fs').textContent = Fs.toFixed(4);
            document.getElementById('z15-res-dmax').textContent = dMax.toFixed(1);
            const status = document.getElementById('status-z15');
            status.textContent = floats ? 'PLUTA' : 'TONE';
            status.style.background = floats ? '#f0fdf4' : '#fff5f5';
            status.style.color = floats ? '#166534' : '#b91c1c';
            document.getElementById('z15-explainer').textContent = `Za ${material.toLowerCase()} kuglicu promjera ${dMm.toFixed(1)} mm težina iznosi ${Fg.toFixed(4)} N, dok površinska napetost može dati najviše ${Fs.toFixed(4)} N uz rub kontakta. Granica plutanja za ovaj materijal je oko ${dMax.toFixed(1)} mm, pa kuglica ${floats ? 'još uvijek može ostati na površini' : 'više ne može biti nošena meniskom'}.`;

            draw(dMm, Fg, Fs, floats);
        }

        function draw(dMm, Fg, Fs, floats) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const cx = 300;
            const baseY = 175;
            const r = Math.min(72, Math.max(12, dMm * 18));
            const ratio = Math.min(Fg / Math.max(Fs, 0.0001), 1.8);
            const dip = Math.min(r * 0.9, ratio * r * 0.5);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            if (floats) ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, baseY + dip + Math.sin(phase) * 2, 900, baseY);
            else ctx.lineTo(900, baseY);
            ctx.moveTo(0, baseY);
            if (floats) ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, baseY + dip + Math.sin(phase) * 2, 900, baseY);
            else ctx.lineTo(900, baseY);
            ctx.stroke();

            const ballY = floats ? baseY + dip - r * 0.55 : 235;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(cx, ballY, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            drawArrow(cx, ballY - r - 18, cx, ballY - r - 56, '#1d4ed8');
            drawArrow(cx, ballY + r + 18, cx, ballY + r + 56, '#dc2626');
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('Fσ', cx + 12, ballY - r - 44);
            ctx.fillText('Fg', cx + 12, ballY + r + 48);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.fillText('površinska napetost nosi kuglicu duž oboda', 70, 52);
            ctx.fillText('težina raste mnogo brže jer ovisi o volumenu', 70, 72);

            const barX = 640;
            const barY = 78;
            const barH = 160;
            const fgRatio = Math.min(Fg / Math.max(Fs * 1.4, 0.0001), 1);
            const fsRatio = Math.min(Fs / Math.max(Fs * 1.4, 0.0001), 1);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fee2e2';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, 26, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY + (1 - fgRatio) * barH, 26, fgRatio * barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#eff6ff';
            ctx.fillRect(barX + 70, barY, 26, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillRect(barX + 70, barY + (1 - fsRatio) * barH, 26, fsRatio * barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillText('Fg', barX + 2, barY - 10);
            ctx.fillText('Fσ', barX + 71, barY - 10);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        dS.addEventListener('input', update);
        mS.addEventListener('change', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Kuglica pluta iako je gušća od vode jer sila površinske napetosti (koja djeluje duž opsega) nadjačava njezinu težinu.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z16 — Vizualizacija kapilarne greške {.unnumbered}

Staklena cijev na slici koristi se za mjerenje pretlaka u spremniku vode $p_1$. Staklena cijev je promjera $1 \, \text{mm}$, temperatura vode iznosi $30 \, \text{°C}$. Potrebno je odrediti otklon očitanja zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, te odrediti pravu visinu vode u staklenoj cijevi.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c$$ | $$1 \, \text{mm}$ |
| $\sigma_v, \rho_v$$ | $$0,0712 \, \text{N/m}; 996 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $H$$ | $$0,17 \, \text{m}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $h = ?$
- $H_0 = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Kapilarni uspon:** $h = \frac{2\sigma}{\rho g R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0712}{996 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0005} = \mathbf{29 \, \text{mm}}$
2. **Prava visina:** $H_o = 170 - 29 = \mathbf{141 \, \text{mm}}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 16: Vizualizacija kapilarne greške -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z16-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-control, #widget-z16-advanced .z16-metric, #widget-z16-advanced .z16-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z16-advanced .z16-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z16-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z16-kicker">Z16 laboratorij pogreške očitanja</div>
            <h4 class="z16-title">Uska cijev diže vodu iznad stvarne razine pa manometar očita previše</h4>
            <p class="z16-sub">Glavna pouka ovog zadatka nije samo visina kapilarnog uspona, nego činjenica da mjerena razina nije prava razina. Zato widget sada prikazuje očitanu visinu, kapilarnu grešku i korigiranu visinu u istoj slici.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z16-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Korekcija</div>
            <div><strong>H_o = H - h</strong></div>
            <div>uža cijev -> veći <strong>h</strong></div>
            <div>bez korekcije precjenjuješ tlak</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z16-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-z16-v2" width="900" height="340"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z16-controls">
        <div class="z16-control">
            <label>Promjer cijevi d_c: <span id="z16-val-dc" style="color:#2563eb;">1.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z16-slider-dc" min="0.5" max="10.0" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z16-metrics">
        <div class="z16-metric"><small>Kapilarna greška h</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z16-res-h">29.8</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z16-metric"><small>Očitana visina H</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z16-res-read">170</span> mm</strong></div>
        <div class="z16-metric"><small>Prava visina H₀</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z16-res-true">140.2</span> mm</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z16-explainer" id="z16-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z16-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDc = document.getElementById('z16-slider-dc');
        const HreadMm = 170;
        let phase = 0;

        function update() {
            const dcMm = parseFloat(slDc.value);
            const sigma = 0.0712;
            const rho = 996;
            const g = 9.81;
            const radius = (dcMm / 1000) / 2;
            const hErrorM = (2 * sigma) / (rho * g * radius);
            const hErrorMm = hErrorM * 1000;
            const trueHeightMm = HreadMm - hErrorMm;

            document.getElementById('z16-val-dc').textContent = dcMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-res-h').textContent = hErrorMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-res-read').textContent = HreadMm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z16-res-true').textContent = trueHeightMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-explainer').textContent = `Kod promjera ${dcMm.toFixed(1)} mm kapilarni uspon doda još ${hErrorMm.toFixed(1)} mm na očitanje. Ako instrument pokaže 170 mm, stvarna hidrostatska visina nije 170 mm nego ${trueHeightMm.toFixed(1)} mm. Kako cijev postaje šira, kapilarna greška brzo pada.`;

            draw(dcMm, hErrorMm, trueHeightMm);
        }

        function draw(dcMm, hErrorMm, trueHeightMm) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const tankLeft = 80;
            const tankTop = 70;
            const tankW = 220;
            const tankH = 210;
            const baseY = tankTop + tankH;
            const pxPerMm = 1.0;
            const readY = baseY - 170 * pxPerMm;
            const trueY = baseY - trueHeightMm * pxPerMm;
            const tubeX = 520;
            const tubeW = Math.max(14, 32 - dcMm * 2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(tankLeft, tankTop, tankW, tankH);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.12)';
            ctx.fillRect(tankLeft, trueY, tankW, baseY - trueY);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.2)';
            ctx.fillRect(tubeX, readY - Math.sin(phase) * 1.2, tubeW, baseY - (readY - Math.sin(phase) * 1.2));

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.strokeRect(tubeX, 50, tubeW, 240);
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#16a34a';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(40, trueY);
            ctx.lineTo(860, trueY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#f97316';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(40, readY);
            ctx.lineTo(860, readY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`očitano H = 170 mm`, 600, readY - 8);
            ctx.fillText(`stvarno H₀ = ${trueHeightMm.toFixed(1)} mm`, 600, trueY - 8);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.fillText('narančasta: očitana razina u uskoj cijevi', 60, 38);
            ctx.fillText('zelena: stvarna hidrostatska razina', 60, 56);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tubeX + tubeW + 40, trueY);
            ctx.lineTo(tubeX + tubeW + 40, readY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillText(`h = ${hErrorMm.toFixed(1)} mm`, tubeX + tubeW + 50, (trueY + readY) / 2);

            const barX = 770;
            const barY = 80;
            const barH = 160;
            const errorRatio = Math.min(hErrorMm / 40, 1);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, 24, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillRect(barX, barY + (1 - errorRatio) * barH, 24, errorRatio * barH);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#93c5fd';
            ctx.strokeRect(barX, barY, 24, barH);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.fillText('greška', barX - 8, barY - 10);

            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        }

        slDc.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Pri mjerenju tlaka uskim cijevima (manometri), tekućina se uspinje više od stvarne razine. Tu grešku moramo oduzeti od očitanja kako bismo dobili pravi tlak.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z17 — Kapilarni porast kerozina {.unnumbered}

Cijev promjera $0,75 \, \text{mm}$ uronjena je u kerozin temperature $20 \, \text{°C}$. Kut kvašenja između kerozina i staklene površine iznosi $26^\circ$. Potrebno je odrediti kapilarni porast kerozina u cijevi. Potrebno je odrediti promjer cijevi za koju će pogreška u očitanju zbog površinske napetosti iznositi $1 \, \text{mm}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c, \theta$$ | $$0,75 \, \text{mm}; 26^\circ$ |
| $\sigma_k, \rho_k$$ | $$0,028 \, \text{N/m}; 820 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |
| $\Delta h$$ | $$1 \, \text{mm}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $h = ?$
- $d_c$ za grešku $1 \, \text{mm} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

$$h = \frac{2 \sigma \cos\theta}{\rho g R_c} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,028 \cdot \cos 26^\circ}{820 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,000375} = \mathbf{16,7 \, \text{mm}}$$

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z18 — Transport vode u biljkama {.unnumbered}

Voda sa otopljenim hranjivim tvarima prenosi se u gornje dijelove biljke pomoću sitnih cjevčica djelomično kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Potrebno je odrediti do koje visine će se podignuti otopina ukoliko je promjer cjevčica $0,005 \, \text{mm}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $d_c$$ | $$0,000005 \, \text{m}$ |
| $\sigma, \theta$$ | $$0,073 \, \text{N/m}; 15^\circ$ |
| $\rho$$ | $$998,2 \, \text{kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $h = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

$$h = \frac{2 \cdot 0,073 \cdot \cos 15^\circ}{998,2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0000025} = \mathbf{5,76 \, \text{m}}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 18: Kapilarnost u ksilemu -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z18-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:230px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-scene { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:16px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-control, #widget-z18-advanced .z18-metric, #widget-z18-advanced .z18-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z18-advanced .z18-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z18-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z18-kicker">Z18 laboratorij ksilema</div>
            <h4 class="z18-title">Sve počinje s vrlo malim promjerom cjevčice</h4>
            <p class="z18-sub">Kapilarni uspon u biljkama raste kad promjer ksilema pada. Widget sada izravno prikazuje kako su mikrometarski kanali dovoljni za podizanje vode kroz nekoliko metara, ali i zašto to samo po sebi nije dovoljno za najviša stabla.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z18-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Veza</div>
            <div><strong>h ~ 1 / d</strong></div>
            <div>upola manji promjer</div>
            <div>otprilike dvostruko veći uspon</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z18-scene">
        <canvas id="canvas-z18-tree" width="900" height="360"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="z18-controls">
        <div class="z18-control">
            <label>Promjer ksilema d: <span id="z18-val-d" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> μm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z18-slider-d" min="5" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z18-metrics">
        <div class="z18-metric"><small>Maksimalni kapilarni uspon</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z18-res-maxh">1.50</span> m</strong></div>
        <div class="z18-metric"><small>Polumjer kanala</small><strong style="color:#c2410c;"><span id="z18-res-r">10</span> μm</strong></div>
        <div class="z18-metric"><small>Što dominira?</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;" id="z18-res-dom">kapilarni uspon je velik</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z18-explainer" id="z18-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z18-tree');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slD = document.getElementById('z18-slider-d');

        function update() {
            const dUm = parseFloat(slD.value);
            const d = dUm / 1_000_000;
            const hCap = (4 * 0.073 * Math.cos(15 * Math.PI / 180)) / (998.2 * 9.81 * d);
            const radiusUm = dUm / 2;
            const dom = hCap > 5 ? 'kapilarni uspon je vrlo velik' : hCap > 2 ? 'kapilarnost je značajna' : 'sam uspon je ograničen';

            document.getElementById('z18-val-d').textContent = dUm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z18-res-maxh').textContent = hCap.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z18-res-r').textContent = radiusUm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z18-res-dom').textContent = dom;
            document.getElementById('z18-explainer').textContent = `Kad ksilem ima promjer ${dUm.toFixed(0)} μm, kapilarni efekt sam može podići vodu do oko ${hCap.toFixed(2)} m. Smanjenjem promjera raste zakrivljenost meniska i kapilarni tlak, pa sitnije cjevčice mogu podići vodu više. Ipak, za vrlo visoka stabla kapilarnost nije jedini mehanizam.`;

            draw(dUm, hCap);
        }

        function draw(dUm, hCap) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const trunkX = 220;
            const trunkW = 90;
            const groundY = 300;
            const treeMaxPx = 240;
            const capHeightPx = Math.min(treeMaxPx, hCap * 36);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#16a34a';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(trunkX + trunkW / 2, 110, 86, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#78350f';
            ctx.fillRect(trunkX, groundY - treeMaxPx, trunkW, treeMaxPx);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#d1fae5';
            ctx.fillRect(trunkX + trunkW / 2 - 10, groundY - capHeightPx, 20, capHeightPx);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(110, groundY - capHeightPx);
            ctx.lineTo(820, groundY - capHeightPx);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`kapilarni doseg: ${hCap.toFixed(2)} m`, 110, groundY - capHeightPx - 10);
            ctx.fillText(`promjer ksilema: ${dUm.toFixed(0)} μm`, 110, 46);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.fillText('svjetliji stupac prikazuje koliko visoko kapilarnost sama može podići vodu', 110, 66);

            const tubeX = 620;
            const tubeY = 70;
            const tubeH = 230;
            const tubeW = Math.max(16, 70 - dUm * 0.5);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(tubeX, tubeY, tubeW, tubeH);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)';
            ctx.fillRect(tubeX + 1, tubeY + tubeH - Math.min(tubeH, hCap * 34), tubeW - 2, Math.min(tubeH, hCap * 34));
            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillText('model jedne ksilemske cjevčice', 560, 328);
        }

        slD.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Kapilarnost je dovoljna za podizanje vode u niskom bilju. Za visoka stabla (npr. sekvoje), priroda koristi dodatni mehanizam transpiracijskog vlaka.
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z19 — Tlak u višeslojnom spremniku {.unnumbered}

Sustav na slici nalazi se na temperaturi $20^\circ\text{C}$. Ukoliko atmosferski tlak iznosi $101,03 \text{ kPa}$, a apsolutni tlak na dnu spremnika iznosi $217,7 \text{ kPa}$, potrebno je odrediti relativnu gustoću maslinovog ulja. Relativna gustoća ulja SAE 30 za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $0,89$, dok relativna gustoća žive za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $13,6$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $t_1$ | $20^\circ\text{C}$ |
| $h_{SAE}$ | $1,5 \text{ m}$ |
| $p_{atm}$ | $101030 \text{ Pa}$ |
| $h_u$ | $2,9 \text{ m}$ |
| $p_d$ | $217700 \text{ Pa}$ |
| $h_v$ | $2,5 \text{ m}$ |
| $\bar{\rho}_{SAE30}$ | $0,89$ |
| $h_{Hg}$ | $0,4 \text{ m}$ |
| $\bar{\rho}_{Hg}$ | $13,6$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $\bar{\rho}_{u} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Postavljanjem jednadžbe hidrostatskog tlaka od površine do dna:
$$p_{dno} = p_{atm} + \rho_v g (\bar{\rho}_{SAE}h_{SAE} + \bar{\rho}_u h_u + 1 \cdot h_v + \bar{\rho}_{Hg}h_{Hg})$$

Uvrštavanjem poznatih vrijednosti:
$$217700 = 101030 + 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot (0,89 \cdot 1,5 + \bar{\rho}_u \cdot 2,9 + 1 \cdot 2,5 + 13,6 \cdot 0,4)$$

Rješavanjem po $\bar{\rho}_u$ dobivamo:
$$\mathbf{\bar{\rho}_u = 0,911}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 19: Napredna analiza višeslojnog statičkog tlaka -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z19-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-scene { display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
        @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z19-advanced .z19-scene { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-box { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; }
        #widget-z19-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-control, #widget-z19-advanced .z19-metric, #widget-z19-advanced .z19-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z19-advanced .z19-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z19-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z19-kicker">Z19 laboratorij slojeva</div>
            <h4 class="z19-title">Ukupni tlak gradi se kao zbroj skokova kroz svaki sloj</h4>
            <p class="z19-sub">Ovdje je ključno da se tlak ne "izračuna odjednom" nego da se prati sloj po sloj. Widget zato sada istodobno prikazuje spremnik, trenutni položaj sonde i graf p(z) čiji nagib u svakom segmentu odražava gustoću tog fluida.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z19-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Pravilo</div>
            <div>svaki sloj dodaje <strong>ρgh</strong></div>
            <div>gušći fluid -> strmiji graf <strong>p(z)</strong></div>
            <div>živa zato daje najveći skok</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z19-scene">
        <div class="z19-box"><canvas id="canvas-z19-tank" width="320" height="440"></canvas></div>
        <div class="z19-box"><canvas id="canvas-z19-graph" width="520" height="440"></canvas></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z19-controls">
        <div class="z19-control">
            <label>Relativna gustoća maslinovog ulja sᵤ: <span id="z19-val-ru" style="color:#2563eb;">0.91</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z19-slider-ru" min="0.80" max="1.10" step="0.01" value="0.91" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z19-control">
            <label>Visina maslinovog ulja hᵤ: <span id="z19-val-hu" style="color:#c2410c;">2.9</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z19-slider-hu" min="1.0" max="4.0" step="0.1" value="2.9" style="accent-color:#c2410c;">
        </div>
        <div class="z19-control">
            <label>Dubina sonde z: <span id="z19-val-probe" style="color:#dc2626;">0.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z19-slider-probe" min="0" max="6.2" step="0.1" value="0" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z19-metrics">
        <div class="z19-metric"><small>Apsolutni tlak u točki</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z19-res-p">101.3</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z19-metric"><small>Doprinos maslinovog ulja</small><strong style="color:#ca8a04;"><span id="z19-res-olive">26.0</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z19-metric"><small>Doprinos žive</small><strong style="color:#6b7280;"><span id="z19-res-hg">53.4</span> kPa</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z19-explainer" id="z19-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cTank = document.getElementById('canvas-z19-tank');
        const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-z19-graph');
        const ctxT = cTank.getContext('2d');
        const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');
        const slRu = document.getElementById('z19-slider-ru');
        const slHu = document.getElementById('z19-slider-hu');
        const slPr = document.getElementById('z19-slider-probe');

        function update() {
            const ru = parseFloat(slRu.value);
            const hu = parseFloat(slHu.value);
            const hSae = 1.5;
            const hWater = 2.5;
            const hHg = 0.4;
            const patm = 101.03;
            const g = 9.81;
            const layers = [
                { name: 'SAE 30', h: hSae, r: 0.89, color: '#f97316' },
                { name: 'Maslinovo', h: hu, r: ru, color: '#eab308' },
                { name: 'Voda', h: hWater, r: 1.0, color: '#3b82f6' },
                { name: 'Živa', h: hHg, r: 13.6, color: '#64748b' }
            ];

            const totalH = layers.reduce((sum, layer) => sum + layer.h, 0);
            slPr.max = totalH.toFixed(1);
            const probeZ = Math.min(parseFloat(slPr.value), totalH);

            let currentP = patm;
            let currentZ = 0;
            for (const layer of layers) {
                if (probeZ > currentZ) {
                    const depth = Math.min(layer.h, probeZ - currentZ);
                    currentP += (layer.r * 1000 * g * depth) / 1000;
                }
                currentZ += layer.h;
            }

            const oliveContribution = (ru * 1000 * g * hu) / 1000;
            const hgContribution = (13.6 * 1000 * g * hHg) / 1000;
            document.getElementById('z19-val-ru').textContent = ru.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z19-val-hu').textContent = hu.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-val-probe').textContent = probeZ.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-res-p').textContent = currentP.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z19-res-olive').textContent = oliveContribution.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-res-hg').textContent = hgContribution.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z19-explainer').textContent = `Na dubini z = ${probeZ.toFixed(1)} m apsolutni tlak iznosi ${currentP.toFixed(2)} kPa. U grafu se vidi da svaki sloj dodaje svoj linearni segment, a nagib tog segmenta ovisi o gustoći. Živa zato daje najveći skok tlaka po jedinici visine, dok lakši slojevi daju blaže poraste.`;

            draw(layers, probeZ, currentP, totalH, patm);
        }

        function draw(layers, probeZ, probeP, totalH, patm) {
            const scaleY = 400 / totalH;
            ctxT.clearRect(0, 0, cTank.width, cTank.height);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxT.fillRect(0, 0, cTank.width, cTank.height);
            let y = 20;
            layers.forEach((layer) => {
                const layerH = layer.h * scaleY;
                ctxT.fillStyle = layer.color;
                ctxT.globalAlpha = 0.82;
                ctxT.fillRect(60, y, 200, layerH);
                ctxT.globalAlpha = 1;
                ctxT.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctxT.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
                ctxT.fillText(layer.name, 80, y + layerH / 2 + 4);
                y += layerH;
            });
            ctxT.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxT.strokeRect(60, 20, 200, totalH * scaleY);
            const py = 20 + probeZ * scaleY;
            ctxT.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctxT.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxT.beginPath();
            ctxT.moveTo(30, py);
            ctxT.lineTo(290, py);
            ctxT.stroke();
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctxT.fillText(`z = ${probeZ.toFixed(1)} m`, 182, py - 8);

            ctxG.clearRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxG.fillRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
            const padX = 58;
            const padY = 24;
            const maxP = 230;
            const scaleX = (cGraph.width - padX - 24) / (maxP - patm);
            ctxG.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(padX, padY);
            ctxG.lineTo(padX, padY + totalH * scaleY);
            ctxG.lineTo(cGraph.width - 20, padY + totalH * scaleY);
            ctxG.stroke();

            let curZ = 0;
            let curP = patm;
            ctxG.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(padX, padY);
            layers.forEach((layer) => {
                const nextZ = curZ + layer.h;
                const nextP = curP + (layer.r * 1000 * 9.81 * layer.h) / 1000;
                ctxG.strokeStyle = layer.color;
                ctxG.lineTo(padX + (nextP - patm) * scaleX, padY + nextZ * scaleY);
                ctxG.stroke();
                ctxG.beginPath();
                ctxG.moveTo(padX + (nextP - patm) * scaleX, padY + nextZ * scaleY);
                curZ = nextZ;
                curP = nextP;
            });
            const gx = padX + (probeP - patm) * scaleX;
            const gy = padY + probeZ * scaleY;
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.arc(gx, gy, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctxG.fill();
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxG.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctxG.fillText('p(z)', padX + 8, 18);
        }

        slRu.addEventListener('input', update);
        slHu.addEventListener('input', update);
        slPr.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Hidrostatski tlak u višeslojnim sustavima računa se kao suma doprinosa svakog pojedinog sloja. Nagib linije na grafu p(z) direktno je proporcionalan gustoći fluida u tom sloju.
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z20 — Intravenozna infuzija {.unnumbered}

Intravenozna infuzija obično se vrši gravitacijski ovješenjem spremnika tekućine na dovoljnoj visini koja će nadvladati tlak krvi unutar krvnih žila te potisnuti fluid unutar tijela. Gustoća tekućine iznosi $\rho_i = 1020 \, \text{kg/m}^3$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $h_{i1}$ | $1,2 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_i$ | $1020 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $p_{k2}$ | $20000 \text{ Pa}$ |
| $p_{mmHg}$ | $180 \text{ mmHg}$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $p_{k1} = ?
- h_{i2} = ?
- h_{i3} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

a) Pretlak krvi kada je hidrostatski tlak izjednačen s visinom krvi ($h_{i1} = 1,2 \text{ m}$):
$$p_{k1} = \rho_i g h_{i1} = 1020 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,2 = \mathbf{12007,4 \text{ Pa}} \approx \mathbf{12 \text{ kPa}}$$

b) Visina ovješenja potrebna za pretlak $p_{k2} = 20000 \text{ Pa}$:
$$h_{i2} = \frac{p_{k2}}{\rho_i g} = \frac{20000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,0 \text{ m}}$$

c) Visina ovješenja za tlak od $180 \text{ mmHg}$:
$$180 \text{ mmHg} = 180 \cdot 133,322 = 23998 \text{ Pa} \approx 24 \text{ kPa}$$
$$h_{i3} = \frac{24000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ m}}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 20: Napredni simulator IV infuzije -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z20-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-scene { display:grid; grid-template-columns:120px 1fr; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
        @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z20-advanced .z20-scene { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-visual-box, #widget-z20-advanced .pressure-compare { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .pressure-compare { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:center; gap:20px; padding:18px; min-height:340px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .p-bar { width:34px; position:relative; border-radius:12px 12px 0 0; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .p-bar-label { position:absolute; top:-24px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:800; white-space:nowrap; color:#64748b; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .iv-visual-box { overflow:hidden; }
        #widget-z20-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-control, #widget-z20-advanced .z20-metric, #widget-z20-advanced .z20-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .status-pill { padding:12px; text-align:center; font-weight:800; font-size:0.86rem; border-radius:12px; }
        #widget-z20-advanced .z20-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z20-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z20-kicker">Z20 laboratorij infuzije</div>
            <h4 class="z20-title">Infuzija radi samo kad je hidrostatski stupac viši od krvnog tlaka</h4>
            <p class="z20-sub">Ovaj primjer nije samo usporedba dvaju brojeva. Treba vidjeti fizički lanac: visina vrećice određuje tlak infuzije, taj tlak se uspoređuje s krvnim tlakom u veni, a razlika određuje hoće li tekućina teći prema pacijentu ili će se krv početi vraćati u cjevčicu.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z20-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Kriterij</div>
            <div><strong>p_inf = ρgh</strong></div>
            <div>ako je <strong>p_inf > p_krv</strong> -> protok</div>
            <div>ako nije -> rizik povrata krvi</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z20-scene">
        <div id="z20-bars" class="pressure-compare">
            <div id="z20-bar-inf" class="p-bar" style="background:#3b82f6; height:50%;"><span class="p-bar-label">p_inf</span></div>
            <div id="z20-bar-bld" class="p-bar" style="background:#ef4444; height:70%;"><span class="p-bar-label">p_krv</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="iv-visual-box">
            <canvas id="canvas-z20-iv" width="760" height="340"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z20-controls">
        <div class="z20-control">
            <label>Visina vrećice h: <span id="z20-val-h" style="color:#2563eb;">1.20</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z20-slider-h" min="0.2" max="3.0" step="0.05" value="1.2" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="z20-control">
            <label>Sistolički tlak krvi: <span id="z20-val-bp" style="color:#dc2626;">120</span> mmHg</label>
            <input type="range" id="z20-slider-bp" min="60" max="220" step="5" value="120" style="accent-color:#dc2626;">
        </div>
        <div class="z20-control">
            <div id="z20-status" class="status-pill">PROVJERAVAM...</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z20-metrics">
        <div class="z20-metric"><small>Tlak infuzije</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;" id="z20-calc-pi">12.0 kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z20-metric"><small>Tlak krvi</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;" id="z20-calc-pb">16.0 kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z20-metric"><small>Razlika Δp</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z20-res-diff">-4.0</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z20-metric"><small>Visina za ravnotežu</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z20-res-heq">1.60</span> m</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z20-explainer" id="z20-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z20-iv');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slH = document.getElementById('z20-slider-h');
        const slBp = document.getElementById('z20-slider-bp');
        const bInf = document.getElementById('z20-bar-inf');
        const bBld = document.getElementById('z20-bar-bld');
        const stEl = document.getElementById('z20-status');
        let phase = 0;

        function update() {
            const h = parseFloat(slH.value);
            const bpMmhg = parseFloat(slBp.value);
            const rho = 1020;
            const g = 9.81;
            const pInf = (rho * g * h) / 1000;
            const pBld = (bpMmhg * 133.322) / 1000;
            const diff = pInf - pBld;
            const hEq = (pBld * 1000) / (rho * g);

            document.getElementById('z20-val-h').textContent = h.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z20-val-bp').textContent = bpMmhg.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z20-calc-pi').textContent = `${pInf.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
            document.getElementById('z20-calc-pb').textContent = `${pBld.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
            document.getElementById('z20-res-diff').textContent = diff.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z20-res-heq').textContent = hEq.toFixed(2);

            bInf.style.height = `${Math.min(92, Math.max(12, (pInf / 32) * 100))}%`;
            bBld.style.height = `${Math.min(92, Math.max(12, (pBld / 32) * 100))}%`;

            if (diff > 2) {
                stEl.textContent = 'SIGURAN PROTOK';
                stEl.style.background = '#dcfce7';
                stEl.style.color = '#166534';
            } else if (diff > 0) {
                stEl.textContent = 'PROTOK JE GRANIČAN';
                stEl.style.background = '#fef3c7';
                stEl.style.color = '#92400e';
            } else {
                stEl.textContent = 'RIZIK POVRATA KRVI';
                stEl.style.background = '#fee2e2';
                stEl.style.color = '#991b1b';
            }

            document.getElementById('z20-explainer').textContent = `Za visinu vrećice ${h.toFixed(2)} m tlak infuzije iznosi ${pInf.toFixed(1)} kPa, a krvni tlak ${pBld.toFixed(1)} kPa. Razlika je ${diff.toFixed(1)} kPa. Ravnoteža nastupa oko ${hEq.toFixed(2)} m: ispod te visine infuzija ne može pouzdano tjerati tekućinu u venu.`;
            draw(h, pInf, pBld, diff);
        }

        function draw(h, pInf, pBld, diff) {
            phase += 0.04;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const armY = 258;
            const bagX = 180;
            const bagY = 250 - h * 78;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#fde68a';
            ctx.fillRect(70, armY, 600, 52);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('vena pacijenta', 560, 248);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.lineWidth = 5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(bagX + 34, bagY + 80);
            ctx.lineTo(bagX + 34, armY + 26);
            ctx.lineTo(540, armY + 26);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.fillRect(bagX, bagY, 68, 82);
            ctx.strokeRect(bagX, bagY, 68, 82);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.22)';
            ctx.fillRect(bagX + 4, bagY + 34, 60, 44);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.fillText(`h = ${h.toFixed(2)} m`, bagX - 8, bagY - 12);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(40, bagY + 80);
            ctx.lineTo(700, bagY + 80);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.fillText(`p_inf = ${pInf.toFixed(1)} kPa`, 88, 44);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
            ctx.fillText(`p_krv = ${pBld.toFixed(1)} kPa`, 88, 64);

            if (diff > 0) {
                for (let i = 0; i < 7; i += 1) {
                    const travel = (phase * 55 + i * 72) % 430;
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(bagX + 34 + Math.min(travel, 0), bagY + 80 + Math.max(0, Math.min(1, travel / 1)) * 0, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
                for (let i = 0; i < 7; i += 1) {
                    const t = (phase * 48 + i * 58) % 420;
                    const x = bagX + 34 + Math.min(0, 0);
                    const y = bagY + 80 + Math.min(t, armY + 26 - (bagY + 80));
                    const x2 = 540 - Math.max(0, 420 - t);
                    const px = t < armY + 26 - (bagY + 80) ? bagX + 34 : x2;
                    const py = t < armY + 26 - (bagY + 80) ? y : armY + 26;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(px, py, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
                ctx.fillText('tok ide prema veni', 430, 90);
            } else {
                const rise = 30 + Math.sin(phase * 2) * 8;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
                ctx.fillRect(538, armY + 26 - rise, 5, rise);
                ctx.fillText('krv se može vraćati u cjevčicu', 392, 90);
            }
        }

        function animate() {
            update();
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        slH.addEventListener('input', update);
        slBp.addEventListener('input', update);
        animate();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Da bi infuzija tekla u venu, hidrostatski tlak stupca tekućine mora biti veći od krvnog tlaka u toj točki. U suprotnom, krv će krenuti prema gore u cjevčicu infuzije.
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z21 — Utjecaj težine zraka {.unnumbered}

Zatvoreni spremnik sa slike temperature je $20^\circ\text{C}$. Apsolutni tlak u točki A iznosi $98 \text{ kPa}$. Gustoća zraka pri $20^\circ\text{C}$ iznosi $\rho_z = 1,2041 \text{ kg/m}^3$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $p_A$ | $98000 \text{ Pa}$ |
| $h_{zA} | 5 \text{ m} |
| h_{vA} | 3 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_{z20}$ | $1,2041 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $h_{zB} | 3 \text{ m} |
| h_{vB} | 5 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_{v20}$ | $998 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $p_B = ?, \Delta p_{err} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

a) Postavljanjem jednadžbe od A do B preko zraka i vode:
$$p_B = p_A + \rho_z g (h_{zA} - h_{zB}) - \rho_v g (h_{vB} - h_{vA})$$
$$p_B = 98000 + 1,2041 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = \mathbf{78443,2 \text{ Pa}}$$

b) Pogreška uzrokovana zanemarivanjem utjecaja specifične težine zraka:
Bez utjecaja zraka:
$$p_B = p_A - \rho_v g \Delta h_v = 98000 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = 78419,6 \text{ Pa}$$
$$\Delta p_{err} = 78443,2 - 78419,6 = 23,6 \text{ Pa} \approx \mathbf{0,03\%}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 21: Vizualizacija utjecaja težine zraka -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z21-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-scene { display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
        @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z21-advanced .z21-scene { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-box { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; }
        #widget-z21-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-control, #widget-z21-advanced .z21-metric, #widget-z21-advanced .z21-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-control { padding:14px 16px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-control label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-control input { width:100%; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-metric { padding:14px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z21-advanced .z21-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z21-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z21-kicker">Z21 laboratorij zraka</div>
            <h4 class="z21-title">Zrak doprinosi malo, voda mnogo</h4>
            <p class="z21-sub">Bit ovog zadatka je usporedba dva doprinosa različitog predznaka. Silazeći kroz zračni stupac tlak malo raste, a zatim se pri prijelazu kroz vodu tlak snažno mijenja zbog mnogo veće gustoće vode. Zato je pogreška zanemarivanja zraka mala, ali mjerljiva.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z21-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Jednadžba</div>
            <div><strong>p_B = p_A + ρ_z g Δh_z - ρ_v g Δh_v</strong></div>
            <div>zrak: mali plus</div>
            <div>voda: veliki minus</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z21-scene">
        <div class="z21-box"><canvas id="canvas-z21-tank" width="320" height="360"></canvas></div>
        <div class="z21-box"><canvas id="canvas-z21-graph" width="520" height="360"></canvas></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z21-controls">
        <div class="z21-control">
            <label>Zračni stupac Δh_z: <span id="z21-val-hz" style="color:#64748b;">5.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z21-slider-hz" min="1" max="100" step="1" value="5" style="accent-color:#64748b;">
        </div>
        <div class="z21-control">
            <label>Vodeni stupac Δh_v: <span id="z21-val-hv" style="color:#2563eb;">5.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z21-slider-hv" min="1" max="20" step="0.5" value="5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z21-metrics">
        <div class="z21-metric"><small>Točan tlak p_B</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z21-res-pb">48.11</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z21-metric"><small>Bez težine zraka</small><strong style="color:#b91c1c;"><span id="z21-res-pb0">48.05</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z21-metric"><small>Doprinos zraka</small><strong style="color:#475569;"><span id="z21-res-dpz">59</span> Pa</strong></div>
        <div class="z21-metric"><small>Pogreška zanemarivanja</small><strong style="color:#7c3aed;"><span id="z21-res-err">0.024</span> %</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z21-explainer" id="z21-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cTank = document.getElementById('canvas-z21-tank');
        const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-z21-graph');
        const ctxT = cTank.getContext('2d');
        const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');
        const slHz = document.getElementById('z21-slider-hz');
        const slHv = document.getElementById('z21-slider-hv');

        function update() {
            const hz = parseFloat(slHz.value);
            const hv = parseFloat(slHv.value);
            const pA = 98.0;
            const rhoz = 1.2041;
            const rhov = 998;
            const g = 9.81;
            const dpz = rhoz * g * hz;
            const dpv = rhov * g * hv;
            const pBExact = pA + dpz / 1000 - dpv / 1000;
            const pBApprox = pA - dpv / 1000;
            const err = Math.abs((pBExact - pBApprox) / pBExact) * 100;

            document.getElementById('z21-val-hz').textContent = hz.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z21-val-hv').textContent = hv.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z21-res-pb').textContent = pBExact.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z21-res-pb0').textContent = pBApprox.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z21-res-dpz').textContent = Math.round(dpz).toString();
            document.getElementById('z21-res-err').textContent = err.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z21-explainer').textContent = `Za zračni stupac ${hz.toFixed(1)} m doprinos zraka iznosi samo ${Math.round(dpz)} Pa, dok vodeni stupac ${hv.toFixed(1)} m mijenja tlak za ${(dpv / 1000).toFixed(2)} kPa. Zato je točan tlak u B ${pBExact.toFixed(2)} kPa, a zanemarivanje zraka daje samo malu relativnu pogrešku od ${err.toFixed(3)} %.`;

            draw(hz, hv, dpz, dpv, pA, pBExact, pBApprox);
        }

        function draw(hz, hv, dpz, dpv, pA, pBExact, pBApprox) {
            const totalH = hz + hv;
            const scaleY = 300 / totalH;
            ctxT.clearRect(0, 0, cTank.width, cTank.height);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxT.fillRect(0, 0, cTank.width, cTank.height);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#f1f5f9';
            ctxT.fillRect(70, 30, 180, hz * scaleY);
            ctxT.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.65)';
            ctxT.fillRect(70, 30 + hz * scaleY, 180, hv * scaleY);
            ctxT.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxT.strokeRect(70, 30, 180, totalH * scaleY);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctxT.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctxT.fillText('zrak: mali porast tlaka', 90, 48);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctxT.fillText('voda: veliki pad/rast po visini', 90, 30 + hz * scaleY + 24);
            ctxT.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxT.fillText('A', 46, 48);
            ctxT.fillText('B', 46, 30 + totalH * scaleY - 8);

            ctxG.clearRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctxG.fillRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
            const originX = 60;
            const originY = 30;
            const width = 400;
            const minP = Math.min(pBExact, pBApprox) - 5;
            const maxP = pA + 2;
            const scaleX = width / (maxP - minP);
            ctxG.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(originX, originY);
            ctxG.lineTo(originX, originY + totalH * scaleY);
            ctxG.lineTo(originX + width, originY + totalH * scaleY);
            ctxG.stroke();
            const xA = originX + (pA - minP) * scaleX;
            const xAir = originX + (pA + dpz / 1000 - minP) * scaleX;
            const xB = originX + (pBExact - minP) * scaleX;
            const yAir = originY + hz * scaleY;
            const yB = originY + totalH * scaleY;
            ctxG.strokeStyle = '#64748b';
            ctxG.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(xA, originY);
            ctxG.lineTo(xAir, yAir);
            ctxG.stroke();
            ctxG.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctxG.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(xAir, yAir);
            ctxG.lineTo(xB, yB);
            ctxG.stroke();
            ctxG.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctxG.setLineDash([6, 5]);
            ctxG.beginPath();
            ctxG.moveTo(xA, originY);
            ctxG.lineTo(originX + (pBApprox - minP) * scaleX, yB);
            ctxG.stroke();
            ctxG.setLineDash([]);
            ctxG.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctxG.fillText('točno s težinom zraka', xAir + 10, yAir - 8);
            ctxG.fillText('isprekidano: bez zraka', originX + (pBApprox - minP) * scaleX + 10, yB - 12);
        }

        slHz.addEventListener('input', update);
        slHv.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

<div class="widget-container" id="widget-air-extremes" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #eff6ff 0%, #ffffff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-air-extremes .air-head { text-align:center; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-air-extremes .air-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }
        @media (max-width: 760px) { #widget-air-extremes .air-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-air-extremes .air-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius:18px; padding:18px; }
        #widget-air-extremes .weight-box { width:100%; height:140px; background:#f8fafc; margin:15px 0; border-radius:12px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; position:relative; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; overflow:hidden; }
        #widget-air-extremes .air-mass-fill { background:linear-gradient(180deg, #cbd5e1 0%, #64748b 100%); position:absolute; bottom:0; width:100%; transition:height 0.5s; }
        #widget-air-extremes .air-metric { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; margin-top:8px; }
    </style>

    <div class="air-head">
        <h4 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">Ekstremi: kada težina zraka prestaje biti zanemariva?</h4>
        <p style="margin:8px auto 0 auto; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:700px;">Ovaj dodatni blok povezuje dva rubna slučaja: jako stlačen zrak u spremniku i vrlo veliki vertikalni razmak. Tek tada doprinos zraka postaje dovoljno velik da ga student mora osjetiti kao stvarnu masu ili stvarni pad tlaka.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="air-grid">
        <div class="air-card">
            <h5 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">Stlačeni zrak u boci od 50 L</h5>
            <label style="display:block; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; color:#334155;">Tlak: <span id="air-ex-val-p">1</span> bar</label>
            <input type="range" id="air-ex-slider-p" min="1" max="300" value="1" style="width:100%; accent-color:#1d4ed8;">
            <div class="weight-box">
                <div id="air-ex-fill-p" class="air-mass-fill"></div>
                <div style="z-index:1; text-align:center; font-weight:800; color:#0f172a;"><span id="air-ex-mass-p">0.06</span> kg zraka</div>
            </div>
            <div class="air-metric"><span>Gustoća zraka</span><strong><span id="air-ex-res-rho">1.19</span> kg/m³</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class="air-card">
            <h5 style="margin:0; color:#1e40af;">Velika visinska razlika</h5>
            <label style="display:block; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; color:#334155;">ΔH: <span id="air-ex-val-h">0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="air-ex-slider-h" min="0" max="4000" step="100" value="0" style="width:100%; accent-color:#dc2626;">
            <div class="weight-box">
                <div style="font-size:2rem; z-index:1;">🏗️</div>
                <div style="position:absolute; bottom:12px; font-weight:800; color:#ef4444; font-size:0.88rem; z-index:1;">Δp = <span id="air-ex-res-dp">0</span> Pa</div>
            </div>
            <div class="air-metric"><span>Ekvivalentni vodeni stupac</span><strong><span id="air-ex-res-water">0.0</span> mm H₂O</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <p id="air-ex-explainer" style="margin:14px 0 0 0; color:#334155; font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.55;"></p>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const slP = document.getElementById('air-ex-slider-p');
        const slH = document.getElementById('air-ex-slider-h');

        function update() {
            const p = parseFloat(slP.value);
            const density = (p * 100000) / (287 * 293);
            const mass = density * 0.05;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-val-p').textContent = p.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-mass-p').textContent = mass.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-res-rho').textContent = density.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-fill-p').style.height = `${Math.min(100, (p / 300) * 100)}%`;

            const h = parseFloat(slH.value);
            const dp = 1.204 * 9.81 * h;
            const waterMm = dp / (1000 * 9.81) * 1000;
            document.getElementById('air-ex-val-h').textContent = h.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-res-dp').textContent = Math.round(dp).toString();
            document.getElementById('air-ex-res-water').textContent = waterMm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('air-ex-explainer').textContent = `Pri ${p.toFixed(0)} bar u boci od 50 L masa zraka naraste na ${mass.toFixed(2)} kg. Na visinskoj razlici ${h.toFixed(0)} m težina zraka daje oko ${Math.round(dp)} Pa, što odgovara približno ${waterMm.toFixed(1)} mm vodenog stupca. Tek u takvim ekstremima zrak prestaje biti zanemariv.`;
        }

        slP.addEventListener('input', update);
        slH.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 U većini strojarskih proračuna težina zraka se zanemaruje jer je voda oko 830 puta gušća. Ipak, kod velikih visinskih razlika (rudnici, neboderi) ili visokih tlakova (spremnici pod tlakom), doprinos zraka postaje mjerljiv.
</div>

```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z22 — Manometar na planini {.unnumbered}

Voda u spremniku predtlačena je zrakom, pri čemu se tlak očitava pomoću višefluidnog manometra. Spremnik se nalazi na planini nadmorske visine $1400 \text{ m}$ pri čemu atmosferski tlak iznosi $85,6 \text{ kPa}$. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div>
<div class="label">Zadano</div>

| Veličina | Vrijednost |
|---|---|
| $p_{atm}$ | $85600 \text{ Pa}$ |
| $h_1 | 0,1 \text{ m} |
| h_2 | 0,2 \text{ m} |
| h_3 | 0,46 \text{ m}$ |
| $\rho_v$ | $1000 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $\rho_u$ | $850 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |
| $\rho_{Hg}$ | $13600 \text{ kg/m}^3$ |

</div>
<div>
<div class="label">Odrediti</div>

- $p_{m1} = ?$

</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

Postavljanjem jednadžbe manometra od točke 1 (zrak) do otvorenog kraja (atmosfera):
$$p_1 + \rho_v g h_1 + \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_{Hg} g h_3 = p_{atm}$$

Pretlak zraka u spremniku ($p_{m1} = p_1 - p_{atm}$):
$$p_{m1} = \rho_{Hg} g h_3 - \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_v g h_1$$
$$p_{m1} = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,46 - 850 \cdot 0,2 - 1000 \cdot 0,1) = \mathbf{58723 \text{ Pa}} \approx \mathbf{58,7 \text{ kPa}}$$

Apsolutni tlak u posudi iznosi:
$$p_1 = p_{m1} + p_{atm} = 58723 + 85600 = \mathbf{144,3 \text{ kPa}}$$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 22: Napredna analiza manometra na visini -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z22-advanced" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <style>
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:18px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-kicker { font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-title { margin:0; font-size:1.42rem; color:#0f172a; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-sub { margin:8px 0 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.55; max-width:620px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-note { background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92); color:#e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:10px 14px; font-size:0.8rem; line-height:1.45; min-width:240px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .mountain-env { position:relative; height:140px; margin-bottom:16px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; background:#dbeafe; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:0.95fr 1.05fr; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
        @media (max-width: 860px) { #widget-z22-advanced .z22-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-controls, #widget-z22-advanced .manometer-visual, #widget-z22-advanced .z22-metric, #widget-z22-advanced .z22-explainer { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:18px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-controls { padding:16px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-controls label { display:block; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:#334155; margin-bottom:8px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-controls input { width:100%; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced canvas { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-metrics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-metric { padding:14px; }
```
