```{=html}
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-metric small { display:block; font-size:0.68rem; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:6px; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-metric strong { font-size:1.18rem; font-weight:800; }
        #widget-z22-advanced .z22-explainer { padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; font-size:0.84rem; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; }
    </style>

    <div class="z22-head">
        <div>
            <div class="z22-kicker">Z22 laboratorij planine</div>
            <h4 class="z22-title">Na planini pada atmosferski tlak, ali manometarski pretlak ostaje zadan stupcima fluida</h4>
            <p class="z22-sub">Najvažnija poruka ovog zadatka jest razlikovati pretlak od apsolutnog tlaka. Promjena nadmorske visine mijenja <em>p_atm</em> i zato mijenja apsolutni tlak u spremniku, ali pretlak određen višefluidnim manometrom i dalje proizlazi iz razlika visina i gustoća fluida u U-cijevi.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="z22-note">
            <div style="font-weight:800; color:#93c5fd; margin-bottom:4px;">Ključ</div>
            <div><strong>p_m1</strong> određuje manometar</div>
            <div><strong>p_1 = p_m1 + p_atm</strong></div>
            <div>planina mijenja samo <strong>p_atm</strong></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="z22-env" class="mountain-env">
        <div style="position:absolute; inset:auto auto 12px 16px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; font-size:0.84rem;">Altituda: <span id="z22-disp-alt">1400</span> m</div>
        <div id="z22-clouds" style="position:absolute; top:30px; width:100%; text-align:center; font-size:2rem; opacity:0.38;">☁️ ☁️ ☁️</div>
        <div style="position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; height:46px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, #84cc16 0%, #4d7c0f 100%);"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z22-grid">
        <div class="z22-controls">
            <label>Altituda: <span id="z22-val-alt" style="color:#2563eb;">1400</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z22-slider-alt" min="0" max="5000" step="100" value="1400" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
            <label>Visina žive h₃: <span id="z22-val-h3" style="color:#475569;">460</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z22-slider-h3" min="100" max="800" step="10" value="460" style="accent-color:#475569; margin-bottom:0;">
        </div>
        <div class="manometer-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z22-v2" width="540" height="360"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="z22-metrics">
        <div class="z22-metric"><small>Atmosferski tlak</small><strong style="color:#1d4ed8;"><span id="z22-res-patm">85.6</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z22-metric"><small>Pretlak zraka u spremniku</small><strong style="color:#0f766e;"><span id="z22-res-pm1">58.7</span> kPa</strong></div>
        <div class="z22-metric"><small>Apsolutni tlak u spremniku</small><strong style="color:#b45309;"><span id="z22-res-pabs">144.3</span> kPa</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="z22-explainer" id="z22-explainer"></div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z22-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slAlt = document.getElementById('z22-slider-alt');
        const slH3 = document.getElementById('z22-slider-h3');
        const env = document.getElementById('z22-env');
        const clouds = document.getElementById('z22-clouds');

        function update() {
            const alt = parseFloat(slAlt.value);
            const h3Mm = parseFloat(slH3.value);
            const h3 = h3Mm / 1000;
            const patm = 101.325 * Math.exp(-alt / 8000);
            const rhoV = 1000;
            const rhoU = 850;
            const rhoHg = 13600;
            const g = 9.81;
            const h1 = 0.1;
            const h2 = 0.2;
            const pm1 = (rhoHg * g * h3 - rhoU * g * h2 - rhoV * g * h1) / 1000;
            const pabs = patm + pm1;

            document.getElementById('z22-val-alt').textContent = alt.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z22-disp-alt').textContent = alt.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z22-val-h3').textContent = h3Mm.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById('z22-res-patm').textContent = patm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z22-res-pm1').textContent = pm1.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z22-res-pabs').textContent = pabs.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z22-explainer').textContent = `Na nadmorskoj visini ${alt.toFixed(0)} m atmosferski tlak pada na ${patm.toFixed(1)} kPa. Međutim, pretlak zraka u spremniku ostaje ${pm1.toFixed(1)} kPa jer ga određuje višefluidni stupac manometra. Zato apsolutni tlak spremnika postaje ${pabs.toFixed(1)} kPa.`;

            const brightness = Math.max(70, 92 - alt / 120);
            env.style.background = `linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(210, 80%, ${brightness}%) 0%, hsl(212, 80%, ${Math.max(62, brightness - 12)}%) 100%)`;
            clouds.style.top = `${28 + alt / 160}px`;
            draw(h1, h2, h3, alt);
        }

        function draw(h1, h2, h3, alt) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 140;
            const cy = 180;
            const scale = 190;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(cx, cy, 62, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('zrak u spremniku', cx - 42, cy + 4);

            const tx = cx + 62;
            const ty = cy;
            const path = [
                { x: tx, y: ty },
                { x: tx + 46, y: ty },
                { x: tx + 46, y: ty + 128 },
                { x: tx + 144, y: ty + 128 },
                { x: tx + 144, y: ty - 112 }
            ];
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 16;
            ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
            ctx.lineCap = 'round';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(path[0].x, path[0].y);
            path.forEach((point) => ctx.lineTo(point.x, point.y));
            ctx.stroke();

            function drawInner(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
                ctx.strokeStyle = color;
                ctx.lineWidth = 10;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
                ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
                ctx.stroke();
                ctx.fillStyle = color;
                ctx.fillText(label, (x1 + x2) / 2 + 10, (y1 + y2) / 2);
            }

            drawInner(tx, ty, tx + 46, ty, '#3b82f6', 'voda h1');
            drawInner(tx + 46, ty, tx + 46, ty + h2 * scale, '#f97316', 'ulje h2');
            drawInner(tx + 144, ty + 128, tx + 144, ty + 128 - h3 * scale, '#64748b', 'živa h3');

            ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.fillText(`manometar čita isti pretlak bez obzira na planinu`, 230, 42);
            ctx.fillText(`ali p_atm pada kako raste altituda (${alt.toFixed(0)} m)`, 230, 60);
        }

        slAlt.addEventListener('input', update);
        slH3.addEventListener('input', update);
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
💡 Barometarski (atmosferski) tlak opada s nadmorskom visinom. To znači da će manometar koji mjeri pretlak, pri istom apsolutnom tlaku u spremniku, pokazivati veći otklon na planini nego na razini mora.
</div>

```

***

## Dodatak za produbljivanje

Teme poput Stokesova zakona i nenewtonskih fluida ostaju važne, ali u ovoj skripti više ne dobivaju zasebne velike widgete. Razlog je didaktički: osnovna nit poglavlja treba ostati na Newtonovoj viskoznosti, površinskoj napetosti i tipičnim zadacima, bez dodatnog raslojavanja pažnje na kraju stranice.

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-bridge">
    <h4>Što vrijedi ponijeti dalje</h4>
    <p>Za samostalno produbljivanje zadrži dvije ideje: Stokesov zakon povezuje viskoznost s terminalnom brzinom sitnih čestica, a nenewtonski fluidi pokazuju da veza između $\tau$ i $dv/dy$ ne mora biti linearna. To su prirodni nastavci ovog poglavlja, ali nisu više odvojeni interaktivni moduli.</p>
</div>
```
